When she learns Dooku is from Serenno, Jenza offers to give Dooku a tour of the homeworld he never knew, eventually reaching the Great Assembly House, where she shows him the seals of the seven houses and tells him the legend of how her ancestors liberated the planet from the Sith Empire. Dooku feels drawn to an ancient carving of a Tirra'Taka, an ancient dragon of the planet, and his finger brushes the stone, a groundquake causes the building around them to collapse. It takes the intervention of Master Yoda to free the two from the rubble, and once the other Masters help the Grand Master remove the collapsed structure from the area, Count Gora of Serenno furiously confronts Yoda when he hears Dooku's name being voiced, yelling at the Jedi that he never wishes to see his son again. It is there that the young Jedi learns that Gora is his Father and Jenza his sister.[84]
  • 88 BBY[21]
    • Dooku and Sifo-Dyas break into the Jedi Temple's Bogan Collection.[84]
    • By this point, Jedi Master Keeve Trennis had left the Jedi Order and became known as a member of the Lost Twenty.[84]
  • 87 BBY
    • Jedi Master Lene Kostana asks Restelly Quist, Chief Librarian of the Jedi Archives, for assistance in finding the title The Sands of Elath.[84]
  • 86 BBY[21]
    • Members of the Hawk-Bat Clan undergo their Initiate Trials, afterwhich Tera Sinube takes Zang Arraira as his Padawan, Lene Kostana takes Sifo-Dyas as hers, and Yoda takes Dooku as his. Arath Tarrex, secretly the son of Jedi Council member Yula Braylon, is not selected after mocking Dooku for wanting to be selected by the Altiri Master Kostana.[84]
  • 85 BBY[21]
    • Sifo-Dyas receives a Force vision of a deadly solar storm hitting the planet Protobranch. After informing the Jedi Council, he, Dooku and Kostana's pledge to warn the planet, but is forbidden by Yoda and the Council, who points out that Force visions are not absolute and the future is always in motion. Frustrated with the Council, Dooku, Kostana, and Sifo-Dyas go behind the Council's back to inform Tavetti, the senator of Protobranch, of the vision. Afterwards, Dooku, Kostana, Sifo-Dyas and a reluctant Yoda go to the planet itself. Ultimately, Sifo-Dyas' vision comes to pass; a powerful solar storm hits Protobranch, killing much of the population, with the Jedi themselves barely surviving.[84]
    • Pell Baylo is born by this point.[468]
  • 84 BBY
    • Sheev Palpatine is born on Naboo.[21]
    • Gretz Droom is born. (Approximate date)[469]
  • 82 BBY
    • A funeral is held for Countess Anya of House Serenno on the funeral moon of Serenno. A protest breaks out during Lady Jenza's speech honoring her mother, with rocks being thrown at Count Gora. Dooku attends the funeral of his mother and his father Gora physically and verbally assaults him.[21]
    • Master Kostana undertakes a mission to the planet Asusto in order to track down rumors of Sith artifacts on the black market. After infiltrating a smuggler ring on Karazak, Kostana and Sifo-Dyas are led to Asusto, taking Dooku with them. They encounter several Abyssin smuggling nerve disruptors, who Dooku kills in a fit of rage. However, before they can verify the rumors of Sith artifacts, they are captured by the last remaining coven of the Presagers of Hakotei, who enact a dark side ritual using Dooku. He experiences a series of visions of his future, and he uses Force lightning for the first time in order to kill his captors.[21]
    • Maarva Carassi Andor is born.[21]
  • Between 82 BBY and 80 BBY
    • Dooku completes his training with Yoda and becomes a Jedi Knight.[84]
  • c. 81 BBY
    • Clem Andor is born.[470]
  • c. 80 BBY
    • Rael Averross becomes Dooku's Padawan.[21]
    • Qui-Gon Jinn is born[471] on Coruscant.[92]
    • Ky Narec is born[472] on the Cosmatanic Steppes.[473]
  • 76 BBY
    • Dannl Faytonni is born.[474]
  • 72 BBY
    • Mace Windu is born[475] on Haruun Kal.[476]
  • c. 70 BBY
    • Rael Averross becomes a Jedi Knight.[21]
  • 69 BBY[123]
    • Kallidahin researchers discover the ruins of Wiyentaah at Polis Massa.[15]
    • Rahara Wick is born on Hosnian Prime. (Approximate date)[477]
  • 68 BBY
    • Kedpin Shoklop begins to sell vaporators for VaporTech.[478]
    • Anglang Lehet begins working for[479] the Cularin Syndicate.[40]
    • The Syndicure of the Chiss Ascendancy removes the Xodlak family from the Ten Ruling Families, demoting them to a Great Family and leaving Nine Ruling Families.[480]
    • Members of Jedi Councilor Tera Sinube's Heliost Clan—amongst them Ima-Gun Di, Gretz Droom, Qui-Gon Jinn, Ky Narec, and Yeeda—are selected to undergo their Initiate Trials. Droom is apprenticed to High Council member Jor Aerith, Narec is apprenticed to Master Mana, and Jinn is apprenticed to Jedi Master Dooku. (Approximate date) Eventually, they expose the corrupt nature of the Jedi Arath Tarrex, who is sent to work in the Jedi Archives as a punishment. Tarrex is also discovered to be the son of Jedi Master Yula Braylon, who loses her seat on the High Council as a result.[84][21]
    • The Jedi Rael Averross, Dooku, Elio and Qui-Gon Jinn fight in a battle on the planet Shurrupak.[481]
  • Between 68 BBY and 58 BBY
    • Dooku and Qui-Gon are send on a mission to rescue the son of Republic Senator Dagonet, who is being held captive by the residents of the Senator's home planet. After their investigation, they discoverd that the Dagonet is allowing his people to starve for his own personal greed and corruption. The kidnappers abducted Dagonet's son to protest his inhumane policies and discover that Dagonet's son is yet unharmed. Dagonet arrives to rescue his son, resulting in a brief shootout between the Senator's forces and the Jedi-backed kidnappers. During a lull in the firefight, Dagonet threatenes to burn the entire village down and many others to make an example of them. An enraged Dooku begins Force-choking Dagonet with the intent to kill him, but Qui-Gon releases Dagonet's son and manages to defuse the situation without any further violence.[482]
  • 66 BBY
    • A Jedi strike team carries out an operation on the planet Numidian Prime to capture the bounty hunter Shenda Mol. After arresting Mol's followers, Dooku and Qui-Gon track Mol and Jinn pursues her on a speeder bike to her valley stronghold but stalls when she holds him at blaster-point. Mol then threatens to kill him, aiming to complete her goal of eliminating one target of every age up to two hundred years old. However, before she can strike, Dooku arrives and attacks the bounty hunter with Force lightning. Afterward, Mol is imprisoned on the planet Stygeon Prime.[483]
    • Pirates enslave the family of Shmi Skywalker.[21]
    • The Radiant VII enters the service of the Republic Diplomatic Corps.[484]
    • The Libertine is constructed by Guild d'Lanseaux.[485]
    • Raddus is born on Mon Cala.[486]
    • Jango Fett is born.[487]
  • 65 BBY
    • After centuries of using energy from small outlying mines,[15] the Theed power generator is built by Outer Rim Construction and Assembly as part of a joint venture between Damask Holdings and Naboo to expand the planet's plasma refining industry. The power generator complex also serves as headquarters of[8] the Royal Naboo Security Forces and its Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps,[488][489] and is unveiled with ceremonies presided by Senator Palpatine of Naboo. With its efficient, mechanistic design breaking with Naboo's tradition, the power generator becomes a popular attraction with its tours while mining much more than needed, with surplus plasma sold off-world and directly to the Trade Federation.[15] Theed Spaceport is also expanded by ORCA as part of Damask Holding's business venture with Naboo.[8]
    • Logray is born on Endor.[490]
    • Jan Dodonna is born.(Approximate date)[491]
    • Naq Med is born.(Approximate date)[492]
    • Hallan Krintu is born.[493]
  • 64 BBY
    • Wilhuff Tarkin is born on the planet Eriadu into the powerful and influential Tarkin family.[17]
  • 62 BBY
    • Cad Bane is born.[494] on Duro.[495]
    • Greef Karga is born on Nevarro. (Approximate date)[21]
    • Irizi'ar'alani is born into the Irizi family, one of the Nine Ruling Families that control the Chiss Ascendancy.(Approximate date)[496]
    • Nim Pianna is born.(Approximate date)[497]
  • c. 61 BBY
    • Cohbo'rik'ardok is born on Rentor.[498]
  • c. 60 BBY
    • Jedi Master Cyslin Myr and her Padawan Mace Windu travel to the planet Mathas, whose inhabitants are suffering from the Niffin plague. Together, they remove a man named Drooz, who is pretending to be a Jedi prophet and healer to trick the inhabitants into paying him for spiritual advice. They openly confront Drooz and arrest him, after Mace disarms him.[21]
    • Qui-Gon Jinn has a romantic relationship on Felucia.[21]
    • The YT-1300 light freighter which will eventually be known as the Millennium Falcon is constructed.[499]
    • Pell Baylo establishes the Defiance Flight Training Institute.[500]
    • Lemuel Tharsa, later named Denetrius Vidian, is born on Corellia.[501]
    • The Ewok Chirpa is born on Endor into Buzza, the chief of Bright Tree Village.[490]
    • Hoss is born.(Approximate date)[502]
  • c. 59 BBY[21]
    • Mitth'raw'nuruodo is born on the Chiss Ascendancy planet Rentor into the small and poor Kivu family.[96]
  • c. 58 BBY
    • Jedi Master Dooku is offered a seat on the Jedi High Council, and Qui-Gon Jinn becomes a Jedi Knight.[21]
  • 57 BBY
    • Obi-Wan Kenobi is born on Stewjon.[21]
      • Within six months of his birth, Kenobi is discovered and taken to the Jedi Temple on Coruscant by the Jedi Order to be trained as a Jedi.[503]
    • Brookish Boon is born on Sy Myrth. (Approximate date)[504]
    • Audj Seedol is born on the planet Lenahra to Ampher and Chemi.(Approximate date)[505]
  • 56 BBY
    • Galen Walton Erso is born on Grange.[506]
    • Kral Grek is born on Mon Cala. (Approximate date)[507]
    • Cady is born.(Approximate date)[508]
    • Bok Askol is born on Shimia.[509]
  • 54 BBY
    • Obi-Wan Kenobi begins training as a Jedi.[21]
    • Baze Malbus is born on Jedha. (Approximate date)[510]
    • Fanry is born on Pijal.(Approximate date)[511]
    • Ameé is born on Naboo.(Approximate date)[512]
    • Maul is born on Dathomir.[513]
  • c. 53 BBY
    • Chirrut Îmwe is born.[514]
  • 52 BBY
    • Palpatine is elected Senator of Naboo.[21]
    • Orson Callan Krennic is born (Approximate date)[515] in Sativran City, Lexrul.[32]
    • Rokura is born. (Approximate date)[516]
    • Maneeli Tuun is born on Polis Massa. (Approximate date)[517]
  • 51 BBY
    • Skelly is born. (Approximate date)[518]
    • Aurra Sing is born on Nar Shaddaa.[519]
  • 50 BBY
    • The Coduyo family of the Chiss Ascendancy declares a family emergency to protect the planet Massoss from a "breakaway alien sect."[520]
    • Asajj Ventress is born on the planet Dathomir to a member of a coven of Nightsisters led by Mother Talzin. While Ventress is still an infant, Talzin's clan comes under a threat associated with the Siniteen criminal Hal'Sted. In order to ensure her people's safety, Talzin arranges for Ventress's mother to surrender the young girl to Hal'Sted, who brings her to the planet Rattatak.[521]
    • Babu Frik is born.[522]
    • Réillata is born on Naboo. (Approximate date)[523]
  • Between 50 BBY and 48 BBY
    • Ambush on Raxus Secundus.[524]
    • Mission to Raxus Secundus (Dooku and Windu).[524]
    • Funeral of Katri.[524]
  • 49 BBY
    • Nim Pianna becomes Rael Averross' Padawan.[21]
    • Gehren Rand, a Jedi Initiate part of the Kybuck Clan at the Jedi Temple, leaves the temple the night before her and her fellow Jedi Initiate Obi-Wan Kenobi are supposed to leave for Ilum to participate in the Gathering, in order to go help her father, who she has seen in danger in Force visions. She eventually makes a deal with the Black Sun Lieutenant Nodrus Cay to be taken offworld in exchange for Eadun silver. Kenobi catches up with Rand, and Cay, having learned the two are Jedi, decides that she wants to take them into her service and has them cuffed. The two Initiates eventually manage to escape, though Rand does not return to the Temple with Kenobi, and instead leaves to help her father.[525]
    • Zodu Onglo is born.[40]
  • 48 BBY
    • A mutiny takes place aboard the cargo freighter Advent, tasked with delivering food to a famine stricken star system. During the mutiny, the head Jedi in charge of protecting the ship, Rael Averross, decides to confront the mutineers alongside his Padawan Nim Pianna in the cargo bay of the Advent as opposed to following normal procedure and retaking control of the bridge of the ship. The skirmish in the cargo bay between the mutineers and the two Jedi results in Pianna's death when she is hit by a slicer dart which caused her to briefly turn on her Master, forcing him to kill her with his lightsaber. By the end of the mutiny, all mutineers were either defeated or arrested.[21]
    • Upon return to the Jedi Temple on Coruscant, Averross is put on trial by the Jedi High Council who rules that his actions were necessary to save the lives of the passengers of the Advent. After the trial, Averross is sent on an eight year assignment to the planet Pijal to mentor the planet's Princess Fanry.[21]
  • 47 BBY
    • Lyra Erso is born on Aria Prime.[526]
    • Riko Vess is born.[527]
    • Canonhaus is born.[528]
  • 46 BBY
    • A large number of attacks in the Greater Seswenna on ore convoys owned by Eriadu Mining and Shipping are conducted by marauders led by the Pirate Queen Q'anah. The Outland Regions Security Force can not defend all the convoys, defending mainly the valuable shipments, and their warships are constantly being monitored by the pirates so that Q'anah's flotilla can perform raids on certain convoys at the right time. In the Outland's anti-pirate taskforce, Wilhuff Tarkin analyses the raids done by Q'anah and finds a pattern in how the convoys were attacked, but his paternal cousin Ranulph Tarkin refuses to test his theory, and decides to secrete a virus into the hyperdrive motivator of specific containers targeted by Q'anah. The attacks increase in the process putting Eriadu Mining on the brink of financial ruin, but despite the rising tensions, Ranulph's plan works and the virus gets into the main computers of the pirate ships and overrides their navigation computer, sending them to the location of a waiting Outland Security fleet. Q'anah and her crew are boarded, captured and put in a transport programmed to fly into a nearby sun.[529]
    • Padmé Amidala Naberrie (née Naberrie)[530] is born on Naboo into Ruwee and Jobal Naberrie.[21]
    • Antoc Merrick is born on Virujansi.[531]
    • Mon Mothma is born on Chandrila into a political family; her father is an arbiter-general in the Republic, and her mother is a governor on their homeworld.[532]
    • Tsabin, later known as Sabé, is born on Naboo.[523]
  • 45 BBY
    • Future Alliance Intelligence Operations leader Davits Draven is born on Pendarr III.[32]
    • Cikatro Vizago is born on Devaron. (Approximate date)[533]
    • Lor San Tekka is born. (Approximate date)[534]
    • Bram Shano is born.[502]
  • 44 BBY
    • The Naboo Reformations occur around this time, and Ekay is elected for her first term as Queen of Naboo.[21]
    • Jedi Master Qui-Gon Jinn chooses Obi-Wan Kenobi as his Padawan learner.[21]
    • Ky Narec rescues Asajj Ventress on Rattatak and takes her on as a Padawan.[21]
    • Pitina Mar-Mas Voor is born.[535]
    • Gorak Palas is born.[502]
  • c. 43 BBY
    • Landonis Balthazar Calrissian is born on Socorro.[536]
  • 42 BBY
    • By this point, Yoda had brought Gheyr from a battle between Wookiees and Trandoshans on Alaris Prime to the Jedi Temple to train as a Jedi. The friendships between younglings Gheyr, Jak'zin, and Krrsish were threatened by the latter's dark visions, and Gheyr eventually leaves her Jedi training and departs Coruscant with Master Dooku.[537]
    • Gallius Rax is born on Jakku.[30]
    • Queen Ekay's second term begins.[21]
    • Rael Averross introduces Dooku to Palpatine.[21]
    • Ramil, the Count of Serenno, orchestrates an invasion of Serenno. With the Republic refusing to aide the supposedly independent world, Dooku is asked by his sister Jenza to provide Jedi assistance. Despite the disapproval of Councilor Gretz Droom and his Mirialan master, Jor Aerith, the Jedi Council chooses to follow the Republic's decision.[84][21]
    • Ramil is killed and replaced by Dooku as the Count of Serenno, the Jedi Master becoming the wealthiest man in the galaxy. Dooku leaves the Jedi Order and eventually becomes the Sith Lord Darth Tyranus, apprenticed to Darth Sidious.[84][21]
  • 41 BBY
    • Obi-Wan Kenobi undertakes a mission to the planet Lenahra, alone when his Master Qui-Gon Jinn fails to appear on time. During his time on the planet, Kenobi encounters a group of Force-sensitive teenagers. At one point during the mission, Kenobi discovers a datachip hidden in a wall by Orla Jareni, a Jedi Wayseeker who had visited the planet long before.[21][538]
    • Qui-Gon Jinn takes Obi-Wan Kenobi to a Wookiee Life Day celebration on Kashyyyk to teach Kenobi that Life Day was a celebration of harmony in Wookiee culture; the balance of the Force. Trandoshan hunters disrupt the festivities, kidnapping Jinn and several Wookiees.[539] (Approximate date)[21]
    • Jedi Eno Cordova and his Padawan Cere Junda are sent by the Jedi Council to oversee the excavation of a temple on Ontotho. The pair are caught in a battle for Ontotho.[540][21]
    • Anakin Skywalker, a vergence in the Force, is born to Shmi Skywalker fatherless.[91][21]
    • Grogu is born. (Approximate date)[541]
    • Rae Sloane is born[542] on Ganthel.[543]
  • Between c. 41 BBY and c. 39 BBY
    • By this point, Duke Adonai Kryze[544] of Mandalore had proudly watched his daughter Bo-Katan Kryze publicly take the Mandalorian Creed at the Living Waters.[545]
    • The Mandalorian Civil War occurs,[546] also known as the Great Clan Wars;[544] Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi are tasked to protect Satine Kryze, leader of the pacifist New Mandalorians.[547] (Approximate date)
      • Kenobi offers to leave the Jedi Order for Satine.[21]
      • After Adonai Kryze's death,[544] Satine's New Mandalorians win the war.[21]
      • Pre Vizsla of Death Watch eventually plans to usurp Satine's leadership by allying with Count Dooku.[544]
  • 40 BBY
    • Queen Ekay's term expires and Queen Amee's first term begins.[21]
    • Galen Walton Erso joins the Republic Futures Program on Brentaal IV.[76]
    • Kirames Kaj serves as Supreme Chancellor of the Galactic Republic around this time.[548][549]
    • Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi go on a mission to the jungle planet of Teth to investigate the possible involvement of the Hutts in the disappearance of agricultural shipments on the Triellus Trade Route.[548]
    • Jedi Master Qui-Gon Jinn and his Padawan, Obi-Wan Kenobi, undertake a mission to Pijal.[548]
    • Qui-Gon Jinn turns down an offer extended by Jedi Master of the Order Mace Windu to take the seat of retiring Jedi High Council member Poli Dapatian.[548]
    • Around this time,[21] Jedi Master Yoda rescues the Force-sensitive youngling Lo from the Flesh Mongers, pirates on Botor who were fearful of Lo's powers. Lo travels with Qui-Gon Jinn to the Coruscant Jedi Temple as Yoda follows a calling through the Force.[550]
    • Yoda finds an embattled world of warring children powerful in stonepower, a Force power attained from connection to the Living Force–imbued blue stone.
    • Yoda, deemed to be the Deliverer of an ancient local prophecy, learns from the conflict of fear, hatred, and greed between the mud dwellers, the rockhawkers, the Old Ones (Vagadarr system), and the giants of living stone, and his journey is later recorded in the Journals of Ben Kenobi.[551]
    • Subsequent to Yoda's visit, most human inhabitants leave their world in curiosity.[552]
    • Maul becomes the Sith apprentice of Darth Sidious.[21]
    • After years of the Chiss Defense Force pleeding to the ruling Chiss Syndicure to expand its capabilities and mandate, the Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet is formed, with the mission to "watch over Chiss interests in the parts of the Chaos extending beyond the Ascendancy's borders, to learn who was out there and assess their level of threat." The Aristocra provide funding for many new ships, bases, and support facilities. (Approximate date)[21]
  • Between 40 BBY and 34 BBY
    • Following centuries of distrust and tension between the neighboring cultures of the Vekurans and Syrinxians, the planet Syrinx Prime is invaded, leading to open warfare with the planet Vekura. Supreme Chancellor Valorum sends a group of Jedi to stop the conflict, while Yoda, Mace Windu, Ki-Adi-Mundi, Vetna Mooncrest and Obi-Wan Kenobi try to thwart the first attack on Syrinx Prime, Qui-Gon Jinn and Berem Khana try to unsuccessfully negotiate with the Vekuran General Lafco, and Adi Gallia and Seera Longa find a large prison camp of Vekurans on Syrinx Prime. After the meeting with General Lafco, Master Jinn becomes the victim of a seemingly unrelated murder attempt by a masked assassin, who after having failed, flees the scene. After a discussion of the High Council is held, the Jedi come to believe that both worlds are guilty, and decide to sabotage the Vekuran shipyards and Syrinxian weapons forge to push them to push General Lafco and President Hoss into negotiating a truce.[553]
    • The Jedi Yoda and Vetna Mooncrest are dispatched on a mission to the remote moon of Veeros to investigate experiments being carried out by the moon's sole inhabitant, Atha Prime. Traveling in a Consular-class space cruiser piloted by Captain Maoi Madakor and Antidar Williams, the Jedi arrive at Atha Prime's palace and are greeted by his droid majordomo Blue-Tark who shows them Prime's renowned bio-fields. Suspecting that there is more being hidden from them, the Jedi leave but return several hours later under the cover of solar activity on the south side of the palace. Entering the structure, they discover a horde of xerexi that Prime had created and battle them before encountering Prime himself. Prime managedsto escape from the Jedi on a starship, but other members of the Jedi Order arrive and eliminate the remaining xerexi on the moon.[553]
    • Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi go on a mission to locate and recover Senator Bail Organa and his staff after they crash in an CR70 corvette on the uncharted Planet WG4587.Before they can reach the corvette, the Jedi's T-6 shuttle is destroyed by a kaijura, but the pair escape the creature and make their way to Organa on foot. On board the corvette, the Jedi learn the vessel was damaged and that a pack of at least nine kaijura is rapidly approaching. Jinn orders the ship to launch and uses the Force to aid it, ordering Captain Jeremoch Colton to launch all the vessel's escape pods into a kaijura that trapps the corvette in mid-air. Once the creature lets go, the corvette is able to escape from Planet WG4587 and return safely home.[553]
    • Robbery of the Galactic Bank of Coruscant.[553]
    • Incident on Liskan.[553]
    • The assassin Corlis Rath and Qui-Gon Jinn engage in a duel on the agriworld of Mina-Rau. Having poisoned and killed the Jedi Master Fondar Etzis with a fast acting toxin, Rath draws Jinn to Mina-Rau to surprise and kill the Jedi, whom he has been hunting because of an incident that occurred when Jinn was a Padawan.[554] Arriving on Mina-Rau as part of an honor guard with fellow Master Mace Windu and Jedi Knight Aayla Secura, Jinn puts together that Etzis has been murdered and senses the assassin's approach when he finally reveals himself, whereas Windu and Secura are caught off guard and knocked out via poison darts. Rath engaged Qui-Gon and reveals his vendetta against the Jedi has something to do with the dangerous world of Sinsara, something that shocks Jinn and gives Rath and opening to stab him through the chest. Poisoned, Jinn's condition is nearly fatal. In order to save Jinn's life, Secura and Windu need to journey to Sinsara itself to find an antidote.[553]
    • Mace Windu and Aayla Secura travel to the planet Sinsara to find an antidote for the Emubara poison that has been administered to Qui-Gon Jinn, where they find a civilisation that despises the Jedi, but guides them in the direction to the equally despised group called The Banished. Meeting the King of The Banished, he agrees to provide them with the antidote for the toxin, as long as they kill a kaijura that was brought to the planet years ago and seasonally kills the people of Sinsara. Slaying the creature, who was suffering from being removed from its natural habitat, they are given the antidote they need. Taking Qui-Gon back to Coruscant, he is saved from the toxin, but with severe injuries he is placed into a medically induced coma for the foreseeable future.[553]
    • Skirmish on a starship.[553]
    • Duel on Sinsara.[553]
  • 39 BBY
    • Sifo-Dyas joins the Jedi High Council. (Approximate date)[21]
    • Padmé Naberrie, her father, and Onaconda Farr help relocate the entire populace of Shadda-Bi-Boran. The populace later dies off as they were unable to replicate Shadda-Bi-Boran's environment at their new home.[523]
    • The Trade Federation starts encroaching on Kashyyyk and its colony worlds, beginning a 20-year-long conflict with the Wookiees.[555]
    • The Chiss Kivu'raw'nuru "Vurawn" is rematched as a merit adoptive of the Mitth family, changing his name to Mitth'raw'nuru and his core name to Thrawn. Later he arrives on the planet Naporar for his tenure as a cadet at the Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet's Taharim Academy.[96]
    • Sky-walker navigator Al'iastov loses her powers of precognition, known as "Third Sight." Concurrently, Thrawn meets Al'iastov aboard the Chiss Defense Force Transport Tomra.[96]
    • Thrawn meets the future Syndic Mitth'ras'safis "Thrass" at his rematching dinner on Avidich.[54]
    • Cadet Thrawn is accused and acquitted of cheating on an exam at Taharim Academy (Approximate date).[96]
    • Ryland is born.(Approximate date)[556]
  • 38 BBY
    • Queen Amee begins her second term.[21]
    • The Naboo Royal Starship is completed.[557]
    • Wald is born on Tatooine.[558]
    • Amee is born.(Approximate date)[559]
    • Zeeth is born.(Approximate date)[560]
    • Padmé Naberrie joins the Apprentice Legislature at the age of eight.[92]
    • Gardulla Besadii the Elder loses[81] Anakin and Shmi Skywalker in a bet to the junk dealer Watto. (Approximate date)[21]
  • 37 BBY[21]
    • Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi are sent to peacefully resolve a dispute on the planet Bri'n between the Metal Clan and the people of Mistress Th'er, the priestess of wood. The leader of the Metal Clan attempts to capture Th'er so that either her word or her blood can be used to destroy her trees. Surrounded by forces of the Metal Clan, Jinn chooses to escape with Mistress Th'er in an Eta-class shuttle and return to Coruscant. Jinn, concerned that the Jedi are seen as warriors of the Republic, seeks guidance from the Cosmic Force. Jinn realizes that the Jedi should pursue balance, for light to finds its way and live through the darkness, coexisting in harmony, through means beyond conflict and violence. He meets with Th'er, suggesting her to recruit allies to her cause to help fight against the Metal Clan.[561]
    • Mitth'raw'nuru "Thrawn" graduates from the Taharim Academy on Naporar, becoming a lieutenant in the Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet.[562][54]
    • Aristocra Mitth'ras'safis "Thrass" meets Thrawn on Naporar, seeking to prevent Thrawn from accepting a rematching offer as a Trial-born of the Stybla family. There, Thrass meets Senior Aide Stybla'ppin'cykok "Lappincyk" and declares his friendship with Thrawn.[562][54]
    • Maketh Tua is born on Lothal.(Approximate date)[563]
    • Ellis Mathes is born on Alderaan.(Approximate date)[564]
    • Ank Parako is born.(Approximate date)[502]
  • 36 BBY
    • Orson Krennic and Galen Erso meet for the first time on Brentaal IV.[76]
    • Ahsoka Tano is born in a village on the planet Shili to Pav-ti and Nak-il Tano.[21][92]
    • Gallius Rax is born.(Approximate date)[565]
    • Sheev Palpatine invites Wilhuff Tarkin to enter politics.[21] At the time, Finis Valorum has been re-elected Supreme Chancellor against expectations, yet, barely a year into his term, discussions begin that he will not be able to maintain his post. Palpatine's name emerges as a possible successor.[17]
    • Queen Amee's reign ends; beginning of Queen Réillata's first term.[21]
    • A skirmish takes place in the Chiss Ascendancy's Kinoss system between the Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet and pirates of the Lioaoin Regime. Prior to the skirmish, Junior Commander Mitth'raw'nuru "Thrawn" of the Expansionary Defense Fleet believes he can prove that the Regime is supporting piracy against the Chiss and other peoples of the region. As such, he undertakes a mission to the Lioaoin heartworld under the guise of a merchant, loudly broadcast that he has discovered pirates, and bait Lioaoin security ships to attack his vessel. Thrawn and the Lioaoin pirates are both navigating using Pathfinder navigators, who have the ability to track each other through hyperspace using the Force. Thrawn uses it to his advantage, baiting the Lioaoin corsairs to pursue his freighter through hyperspace to the Kinoss system, where Mid Captain Irizi'ar'alani of the Chiss patrol cruiser Parala lies in wait. The corsairs fall into Thrawn's trap and are destroyed by the Parala upon arrival. Following the skirmish, the Chiss officers were promoted. It marks the start of the Chiss Ascendancy's Lioaoin pirate campaign.(Approximate date)[21]
  • 35 BBY
    • Lauren Mel Coelho is born[566] on Tangenine.[3]
    • Tiaan Jerjerrod is born[567] on Tinnel IV.[92]
    • Kaeden Larte is born. (Approximate date)[568]
    • Wazellman is born on Wick 111. (Approximate date)[569]
    • The Coruscant Security Force maintains a probe droid in Tach Drud's spice den.[570]
    • Ahsoka Tano is discovered to be Force-sensitive after an encounter with a raxshir.[571]
    • Lioaoin pirates attack a Garwian merchant station over the Garwian Unity planet of Stivic, a trade hub for the local nations of the Unknown Regions. Senior Captain Irizi'ar'alani of the Parala receives a Garwian distress call. Senior Commander Mitth'raw'nuru beggs her to assist the Garwians, as the Lioaoins are also a threat to the Chiss Ascendancy, while Mid Captain Roscu objects as the Ascendancy's non-intervention policy prohibits Chiss Defense Force personnel from engaging in first strikes. But as does not prohibit observation of hostilities between other factions, the Parala goes to observe the battle. Senior Captain Ziara permitts Thrawn to 'calibrate' the ranging lasers, which he uses to send a message to the Garwians in modulated laserfire and tell them how to defeat the Lioaoins. The pirates are defeated by the Garwian Unity forces led by Officer Frangelic. (Approximate date)[21]
  • 34 BBY
    • By this point, Mace Windu had rescued a young girl named Depa Billaba, who was born on Chalacta. The youngling was brought to the Jedi Temple for training.[572]
    • By around this point, Finis Valorum had replaced Skor Kalpana as Supreme Chancellor of the Galactic Republic.[17]
    • Mace Windu, Depa Billaba, Plo Koon, Qui-Gon Jinn, and other Jedi liberate the child soldiers used by Hutt-assisted warlord Guattako on Oosalon. While Windu wanted the child soldiers to find new lives, Grandmaster Yoda asserts that the Jedi Order cannot interfere in local laws, and that the children must face imprisonment for their role in terrorist attacks.[573][21]
    • A battle takes place at the Malastare Narrows after the Corporate Alliance Admiral Trench blockades the planet Malastare, and a Republic fleet, in which Wullf Yularen serves as one of the leading officers, attacks Trench's forces. Trench repels them with ease, causing significant losses to the Republic, so a task force led by Jedi Master Kep-She destroys Trench's flagship and supposedly killed him. However, Trench survives the battle.[574][575]
    • At age 12,[101] Padmé Naberrie's[530] participation in the Legislative Youth Program leads to her meeting and falling in love with the slightly elder[101] Palo Jemabie.[78]
    • Anakin Skywalker starts gathering parts to build C-3PO.[21]
    • Crix Madine is born on Corellia.[40]
    • Darth Sidious brings Maul to Malachor, where the ashes of the fallen Sith fuels the apprentice's hatred for the Jedi.[21][576]
    • Queen Réillata's first term ends; Sanandrassa becomes queen,[21] advocating an isolationist policy.[193]
    • The Corellian Engineering Corporation introduces the Gozanti-class cruiser.(Approximate date)[577]
    • Ky Narec is murdered by pirates, and a distressed Asajj Ventress[578] takes on the role of Rattatak's warlord before she is captured by the warlord Osika Kirske. However, she is freed by Dooku, who takes her on as an apprentice.[579]
  • 33 BBY
    • Ahsoka Tano is accepted into the Jedi Order after Plo Koon discovers her on Shili.[21]
    • Sifo-Dyas secretly orders the creation of a clone army for the Republic on Kamino.[21]
    • The Naboo Crisis is fermented as the Eriadu Conference occurs;[580] as planned by the Sith Darth Sidious, Supreme Chancellor Finis Valorum survives an assassination attempt with a temporary boost in popularity[86] whilst the Trade Federation leadership,[17] as well as potential candidates for the position, including several key executives of Kuat Drive Yards, are killed[581] by the radical political group known as the Nebula Front. Nute Gunray ascends to the position of the Viceroy of the Trade Federation and appoints his allies to powerful positions within the Federation.[86]
    • Around this time, Darth Sidious deploys Darth Maul to prevent his plans from being exposed by eliminating all participants and witnesses of a pirate attack on a Trade Federation fleet.[582]
    • On his personal quest for the auctioned Jedi Padawan Eldra Kaitis, Maul recruits bounty hunters on Nar Shaddaa. Maul's group include Cad Bane, Vorhdeilo, and[583] the Nar Shaddaa-born[92] Aurra Sing.[583] The Sith eventually kills Kaitis and the auction host, Boss-Mistress Xev Xrexus of the Xrexus Cartel.[584][21]
    • A robbery takes place at the Republic Regional Headquarters on the planet Jaloria. The Hope of Glee Anselm, an artifact of the Anselmi and Nautolan species of the planet Glee Anselm, is being presented by the Republic at a ceremony to support a treaty to end the war between the two. A group of thieves interrupts the ceremony and steal the artifact, with one thief escaping alive as Republic troops kill the others. Following the heist, the bounty hunter Jango Fett is hired to track down the thieves and recover the artifact.[585]
    • Mission to Hallitron-7.[586]
    • Mission to Roxuli.[587]
    • Skirmish on Jaloria.[588]
    • Through the fictitious Kaitis Cartel, Maul begins to build his contacts in the criminal underworld.[576]
    • Caleb Dume, later known as Kanan Jarrus, is born[543] on Coruscant.[92]
    • Cassian Jeron Andor is born on the planet Kenari.[589]
    • Nath Tensent is born.[590]
  • 32 BBY
    • Padmé Naberrie[530] defeats Sanandrassa in an election for the throne.[193] Naberrie is crowned[81] during the Day of Ascendancy;[78] The new monarch adopts Amidala as her regnal name.[530][21]
    • Amidala and Captain Quarsh Panaka recruit Royal Handmaidens.[21]
    • By this point, Wilhuff Tarkin had become the Governor of Eriadu with backing from Palpatine.[17]
    • The Geonosian hives manufacture battle droids for the Trade Federation. Those droids would be used in the Federation's upcoming invasion of Naboo.[591]
    • The Millennial Celebration Invitation poster is commissioned by Supreme Chancellor Finis Valorum to celebrate one thousand years of peace since the founding of the modern Republic.[78]
    • A taxation propositional is pushed through by the popular Chancellor Valorum; Prop 31-814D is passed by the Galactic Senate of the Republic and the Free Trade Zones are taxed.[78]
    • Padmé Naberrie hosts the Chommell sector summit in hopes of rebuilding relations with worlds of the Chommell sector.[193]

Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY)[]

Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY)[]

  • 32 BBY (continued)
    • As planned by Darth Sidious, the Trade Federation blockades Naboo in protest of the Senate's decision to tax their much-used Free Trade Zones, escalating the trade disputes.[592][91]
    • Jedi Master Sifo-Dyas had foreseen an upcoming full-scale conflict, but was accused of war-mongering and removed from the Jedi Council.[101][59] He is sent by the Jedi Council to resolve a tribal dispute on Felucia, but instead secretly goes to negotiate with the Pykes on Oba Diah along with Chancellor Valorum's aide, Silman, per the Chancellor's initiative.[593][21]
    • Supreme Chancellor Finis Valorum secretly dispatches Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi to serve as the ambassadors for scheduled negotiations with the Federation in hopes of resolving[91] the Naboo Crisis.[581]
    • Invasion of Naboo; Darth Sidious further manipulates the Trade Federation leadership into instigating a peace crisis for the Republic with the deployment of military forces for the occupation of the harmonious world of Naboo.[91]
      • The Capture of Theed; the Trade Federation Droid Army establishes itself at the Naboo capital and begins forcefully removing its citizens to prison camps.[91]
    • Anakin Skywalker wins the Boonta Eve Classic; with Jedi Qui-Gon Jinn's interference, he is freed from the Toydarian junk dealer Watto and follows the Jedi.[91]
    • As the Jedi group leave Tatooine, a duel ensued as Darth Maul attempts to fell them; Jedi encounters Sith for the first time since the Sith were thought extinct nearly a millennium ago.[91]
    • Dooku deletes the Kamino system from the Jedi Archives records.[594]
    • Battle of Naboo. Queen Amidala returns to Naboo and forms an alliance between the Naboo and Gungans. Qui-Gon Jinn is killed by Darth Maul, who, in turn, is dealt a mortal wound by Obi-Wan Kenobi[91] in the Padawan's rage.[595] Anakin Skywalker deactivates the droid army by destroying the Droid Control Ship.[91]
    • Darth Sidious orders Dooku to arrange for Sifo-Dyas' murder.[21] Dooku fakes Sifo-Dyas' death on Felucia during the tribal conflict there.[593]
    • Dooku turns his back on the Jedi Order, secretly killing Jedi Master Yaddle and becoming Darth Sidious' Sith apprentice, Darth Tyranus.[594]
    • Hired by the Sith Lord Tyranus, the Pyke Syndicate murders Sifo-Dyas while Silman is secretly captured by the Pykes for leverage against Tyranus.[593]
    • Senator of Naboo Palpatine is elected Supreme Chancellor of the Galactic Republic, replacing Finis Valorum.[91] Oshadam takes Palpatine's place as senator of the Chommell sector.[523]
    • The Jedi High Council promotes Obi-Wan Kenobi to the rank of Jedi Knight and permits him to train Anakin Skywalker as a Jedi per the late Qui-Gon Jinn's wishes. The Council, the Chancellor, the Naboo leadership, Kenobi, and Skywalker later attend the funeral of Qui-Gon Jinn and a victory parade at Theed.[91] The Gungans host a funeral at their sacred place for their fallen warriors afterwards.[193]
    • Maul goes into hiding on Lotho Minor.[21]
    • Lord Tyranus hires bounty hunter Jango Fett as the Kaminoans' clone template based on Fett's reputation.[596]
    • Under the control of the Sith, the clones from the template of Fett had behavioral modification biochips inserted which would activate Protocol 66 under the command of the Supreme Chancellor of the Galactic Republic.[593][21]
    • Boba Fett is born[21] as a clone of Jango Fett on Kamino under the name Alpha.[597] Per Jango's request, Boba is the only clone completely unaltered by the Kaminoans,[101] and as the son of Jango, the clone Fett is trained by his father as a bounty hunter.[81]
    • Omega is born after Alpha. Her genome is near-identical to that of Jango Fett and Alpha. Unlike Boba, Omega is kept on Kamino and raised by Nala Se as her assistant.[597]
    • Han is born on Corellia.[598]
    • Miara Larte is born. (Approximate date)[599]
  • c. 31 BBY
    • Disappearance of Doctor Nuvo Vindi, who eventually serves as a Separatist scientist on Naboo.[600]
    • Hetto begins working at World Window Plaza.[543]
    • Lemuel Tharsa, an inspector for the Interstellar Thorilide Guild, contracts Shilmer's syndrome while inspecting the Introsphere refinery on Gorse.[601]
    • Kaeden and Miara Larte moves to the remote moon named Raada along with their parents.[602]
    • Apailana is born[603] on Naboo.[604]
    • Jaybo Hood is born on Iego.[605]
    • Reva Sevander is born.[606]
    • Chanath Cha is born.[607]
    • Rebolt is born.[608]
    • Jagleo is born.[609]
    • Syke is born.[610]
    • Salbee is born.[611]
    • Hawk is born.[612]
    • Thela is born.[613]
  • 31 BBY
    • A secret buyer orders massive quantities of weapons and warships from Kuat Drive Yards.[21]
    • Paodok'Draba'Takat Sap'De'Rekti Nik'Linke'Ti' Ki'Vef'Nik'NeSevef'Li'Kek, simply known as Pao, is born on Pipada.[32]
    • Qi'ra is born on Corellia.[598]
    • Rothana Heavy Engineering, a subsidiary of Kuat Drive Yards, designs and produces Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship for the Republic's clone army in total secrecy.[21]
  • 30 BBY
    • Construction of Darth Sidious' Jakku Observatory begins.[21]
    • Padmé Amidala is re-elected[101] Queen of Naboo.[523][614]
    • Lyra Erso begins studying at the University of Rudrig.[615]
    • Rinnrivin Di is born.[616]
    • Lakris is born.(Approximate date)[617]
  • Before or during 29 BBY
    • An archaeological excavation on the planet Dallenor is led by the archaeologist Clatriffe. The first artifacts uncovered in the excavation include ancient broken droid parts, but eventually an item thought to be a Jedi holocron is found. The Krypder Riders, a pirate gang led by Hudso Shaku, attempts to steal the holocron from the archaeologists, leading Clatriffe to hire some of the planet's natives to protect the area. The Jedi Council receives a message about the holocron, sending Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker on a mission to verify the holocron and return it to the Jedi Order, in Skywalker's first field mission. After meeting with Clatriffe, Kenobi takes the holocron, but the Krypder Riders arrive to take the artifact for themselves. Hudso Shaku confronts Kenobi and notices his lightsaber, wishing to acquire it instead. With help from Skywalker, Kenobi deals with the pirates as peacefully as he can, taking the holocron back to the Jedi.[618] [619]
  • 29 BBY
    • Nax is born.(Approximate date)[620] on Kamino[621]
    • Zett Jukassa is born.(Approximate date)[622]
    • Bom Vimdin is born.(Approximate date)[623]
    • Che'ri is born.(Approximate date)[624]
    • Hera Syndulla is born on Ryloth into Cham and Eleni Syndulla.[63]
    • Anakin Skywalker searches for his first kyber crystal on Ilum. (Approximate date)[21]
    • Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker are send on a mission to the Moons of Varl in the Varl system in order to rescue the missing Senate Intelligence Officer Yarg'l. A splinter faction of the criminal Pyke Syndicate led by Baron Grott has set up the Varl Tournament on the moons, operating out of the first moon Black Rock, and are secretly breeding Kayfoundo Kapa, space-borne predators who hunted the Hutts away from their homeworld of Varl. Skywalker enters the tournament undercover and eventually locates Yarg'l, freeding the officer and negotiating their release before taking part in the final race of the tournament, in which the Hutt Neyfig releases the Kayfoundo Kapa. The creatures overrun the Varl system while the Jedi arrest Grott and Neyfig, and the star system is abandoned and quarantined.[625]
    • Palpatine takes Skywalker undercover in Coruscant's lower levels.[21]
    • Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker travel to Carnelion IV following a distress signal sent from the planet. The Jedi find a war-torn world, split between the Open and Closed factions in the Open-Closed War. The Jedi Order and a Galactic Republic Judicial Forces fleet arrive shortly after, enforcing a cease in hostilities. (Approximate date)[626][21]
  • 28 BBY
    • Padmé Amidala steps down following two two-year terms as Queen of Naboo. Réillata defeats Jamillia in her campaign to succeed Amidala.[523][21]
    • During Réillata's coronation, the new monarch requests that Padmé Amidala take Oshadam's place as senator of the Chommell sector. Amidala accepts and begins leading the Naboo delegation in the Galactic Senate with Jar Jar Binks.[523][21]
    • Sabé begins investigating ending slavery on Tatooine at the behest of Amidala.[523][21]
    • Groundquakes at Bromlarch; Senator Padmé Amidala proposes the Mid Rim Cooperation Motion in hopes of aiding the populace of Bromlarch, where she is assisted by fellow senator Rush Clovis.[523][21]
    • Ryoo Naberrie is born.[523][21]
    • Lina Graf is born to cartographers Auric and Rhyssa Graf aboard the family's Mu-class shuttle, the Whisper Bird.(Approximate date)[627]
    • Bom Vimdin is born.[40]
    • Theed Spaceport is developed with haste using Republic reparation money provided for the Trade Federation invasion. Ignoring the Naboo design aesthetic save for its curved docking platform, it receives immigrants seeking the prospect of spice-mining Naboo's moons and increased traffic resulting from the high-profile tenure of Senator Padmé Amidala. (Approximate date)[15]
  • 27 BBY
    • Cliegg Lars buys Shmi Skywalker from Watto and sets her free; the two then marry.[101][21]
    • The Zillo Beasts are believed to be extinct.[628]
    • Canonhaus becomes a midshipman with the Galactic Republic.[629]
    • Enfys Nest is born.[630]
    • Enric Pryde is born[21] on Alsakan.[50]
    • Gideon Hask is born.[631]
    • Milo Graf is born.[632]
    • Nera Kase is born.[633]
    • The Chiss Ascendancy undertakes a series of operations against the Vagaari pirates.[54]
      • The first battle between the Vagaari pirates and Chiss Senior Captain Thrawn takes place in the Unknown Regions, where Thrawn retrievies a Vagaari gravity-well generator. The capture of the generator persuades the Chiss Obbic family to ally itself with the senior captain's Mitth family.[634]
      • A starship hailing from beyond the Unknown Regions gets involved in the Vagaari pirate operations. Syndic Mitth'ras'safis, Thrawn's brother, and a human female steal the starship from the Chaf family, after a Chaf task force captures it. The pair crashes the ship in an attempt to save the people aboard, which, while it would allow the survivors to thrive for generations with the ship's supplies, according to Thrass's human companion, results in the pair's death.[21]
      • Senior Captain Thrawn severely beats the Vagaari pirates in their last confrontation.[21]
      • The loss of the Galactic Republic technology within the ship and the death of Syndic Thrass result in the Ascendancy's ruling body being unhappy with Thrawn, whose Chiss heavy cruiser Springhawk is taken away as retaliation for his failure. He sustains injuries during the Vagaari pirate operations, and has to undergo physical therapy at the Chiss Expansionary Fleet medcenter on the planet Naporar.[21]
  • 26 BBY
    • Tyranus is sent by Darth Sidious to secure a business arrangement with the weapons-dealing Kaldana Syndicate on Sullust. Tyranus does so while also establishing a business agreement between Serenno and Sullust's SoroSuub Corporation as Count Dooku. Having been sent by the Jedi Council to investigate the underground weapons-dealing on the planet for the Republic, Jedi Knight Jak'zin is killed by Dooku during the latter's mission to Sullust.[635][21]
    • Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker rescue Yoda as part of a test by the Jedi Council.[21]
    • Queen Jamillia's first term begins.[21]
    • Lyra meets Galen Erso on Espinar.[32]
    • Pitina Mar-Mas Voor is married off by her family to a male senator.[535]
    • After spending five years in a medical center on Gorse suffering from Shilmer's syndrome, Lemuel Tharsa reinvents himself as Denetrius Vidian.[636]
    • Shaeeah Lawquane is born on Saleucami.[637]
    • Numa is born[638] on Ryloth.[639]
    • The individual who came to be known as TK-462 is born on Eriadu. (Approximate date)[640]
  • 25 BBY
    • Yupe Tashu, advisor to Darth Sidious, instructs droids to excavate Jakku's Plaintive Hand plateau for the Jakku Observatory. Gallius Rax enters Sidious' service as the project's guard.[641]
    • Bodhi Rook is born.[642]
    • Yendor is born[643]
    • Sarco Plank is born.[644] on Li-Toran. (Approximate date)[645]
    • Jek Lawquane is born on Saleucami.[646]
    • Lyra and Galen Walton Erso are married on Coruscant.[32]
  • 24 BBY
    • Count Dooku delivers the Raxus Address, the Confederacy of Independent Systems is founded.[86]
    • The Separatist Crisis begins.[32]
      • Thousands of star systems leave the Republic and join the Confederacy,[101] and they establish the Separatist Senate.[32]
      • The Republic Senate passes the Emergency Powers Act to ensure Palpatine could remain Supreme Chancellor long after his term's expiry. Palpatine forms his own Loyalist Committee.[21]
      • The Galactic Senate debates the Military Creation Act to determine whether the Galactic Republic should raise an army.[101][21]
    • The Alpha tribes people on the planet Kenari launch an exploratory mission with the hope to secure supplies from a crashed Republic transpo corsair. The Republic ship has the logo of the recently formed Confederacy of Independent Systems, and the crew has succumbed to a poison. A surviving Republic officer kills the Alpha leader, leading to the children killing the officer but leaving with their leader's body. However, one boy, Kassa, is left angered and enters the crashed starship, where he finds the remains of the poisoned crew and begins destroying his surroundings. There, he is found by the Andor family of scavengers, who take him off-world to keep him save from an incoming Republic reprisal.(Approximate date)[647]
    • Han joins the White Worms as a Scrumrat[598] after his father leaves him.[21]
    • Queen Jamillia begins her second term.[21]
    • Chelli Lona Aphra is born to Korin and Lona Aphra.[21]
  • 23 BBY
    • Senator Amidala, though a member of Palpatine's Loyalist Committee,[101] begins working to defeat the Military Creation Act.[21]
    • Orson Callan Krennic helps engineer the construction and overhaul facility.[648]
    • Dalven Kyrell is born on Jelucan.[649]
    • Jango Fett takes his son, Boba, on a hunt on Ord Mantell with a team of three other hunters. The Fetts are betrayed by two of the hunters, though they are killed by Boba, who lets the third hunter go to spread word of the incident. Boba Fett thus begins to build his reputation.[596][21]
    • Ketsu Onyo is born on Shukut. (Approximate date)[650]
  • 22 BBY
    • The mother of the individual who came to be known as TK-462 gives birth to Xea on Eriadu. (Approximate date)[651]
    • Border dispute on Ansion occurs with Skywalker and Kenobi involved.[101] The result of the border dispute left the galaxy staggered.[17]
    • By this point,[101] the Naboo spice-miners' strikes that occurred after the Invasion of Naboo has begun[106] for months.[15]
    • Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala. Separatist leaders hope to silence the senator from Naboo, who opposes the Military Creation Act. The bounty hunter Jango Fett is hired. He uses Zam Wesell in two attempts which failed. Zam is captured, but Jango kills her to prevent the Jedi from questioning her.[101]
    • Mission to Kamino. Obi-Wan Kenobi uses Fett's Kamino saberdart to trace him to the Kamino system in the Outer Rim. There he finds the clone army commissioned by Sifo-Dyas. He finds Jango Fett, and the two battle. Fett escapes with his son Boba, and Obi-Wan tracks him to Geonosis.[101]
    • Anakin is charged with the protection of Senator Padmé Amidala. They go covertly travel to the latter's homeworld while Kenobi searches for the assassin. As they spend more time together, the two fall in love.[101]
    • Anakin is haunted by dreams of his mother dying. Believing them to be true, he returns to his homeworld of Tatooine and conducts a mission to prevent her from dying. He finds Shmi in a Tusken Raider camp, who then dies in his arms. In a fit of rage, he slaughters the Tusken Raiders and swears that he will never again be powerless in the face of death after his mother's funeral.[101]
    • Jar Jar Binks proposes that Chancellor Palpatine be given emergency powers to raise an army without the interference of the Senate. The proposal is accepted, and the clone army developed by the Kaminoans is recognized as the Grand Army of the Republic.[101]
    • Geonosian Archduke Poggle the Lesser, an long-time, ardent supporter of the Separatist cause, hosts the Separatist Council[591] within the hive galleries of his ruling Stalgasin hive colony.[15]
    • The various corporation leaders on the Council,[652] including Nute Gunray of the Trade Federation,[101] ratifies[652] the Geonosian accord;[653] the Confederacy of Independent Systems is officially founded.[653]
    • Obi-Wan Kenobi is captured on Geonosis whilst reporting his findings of the Trade Federation presence and the Separatists' battle droid production to Jedi Councilors Yoda and Mace Windu. Anakin Skywalker and Padmé Amidala go to his rescue but are captured also. The three are set to be executed after their refusal to join the Sith and surrender to Poggle and the Separatists.[101] Amongst themselves, the Jedi assemble a strike team of over two-hundred to save those captured by the Geonosians, whilst Jedi Master Yoda travels to Kamino to gather the Republic's new army.[15]

Clone Wars (22–19 BBY)[]

22 BBY[]
  • The Clone Wars begins with the First Battle of Geonosis;[101] end of the millennium-long Great Peace.[86]
    • Mace Windu kills Jango Fett, fueling Boba Fett's hatred towards the Jedi.[101]
    • Most of the Jedi strike team are killed in their attempt to rescue Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker, and Padmé Amidala from execution.[101]
    • Led by Yoda, the Grand Army of the Republic engages Separatist forces on Geonosis, grounding many enemies vessels and thus most of their forces. However, the attack of the clones failed to prevent the escape of the Separatist Council.[15]
    • Anakin Skywalker loses his right forearm to Count Dooku.[101]
    • Darth Tyranus escapes Geonosis with the plans of a battle station designed by the Geonosians. The Sith apprentice presents the plans to Darth Sidious on Coruscant.[101]
  • Anakin Skywalker and Padmé Amidala secretly wed on the Varykino island, at the Lake Country of the planet Naboo. The ceremony is officiated by Maxiron Agolerga, Pontifex of the Brotherhood of Cognizance, and witnessed by C-3PO and R2-D2.[101]
  • The Republic Grand Army assembles on Coruscant as surviving Jedi from Geonosis return to the planet's Jedi Temple.[101]
  • With their victory on Geonosis, the Republic occupies the world, though they find that they could not afford to maintain the occupation.[591] The planet is retaken by Separatist forces within a year[92] and Poggle the Lesser quickly restarts his droid foundries.[591]
  • The Antar 4 schism that began prior to the outbreak of the Clone Wars further divides the moon's population; Separatists force many Gotals to flee off-world.[17]
    • Skywalker and Kenobi are deployed to the Moon of Staggec to rescue Amidala and senator Yarua. Kenobi duels Grievous and Yarua sacrifices himself to save his daughter Viiveenn.[654]
  • Sabé and Captain Tonra travel to Tatooine, sent by Padmé Amidala, to attempt to free enslaved individuals there. They spend six weeks in Mos Espa and buy a hundred slaves in order to free them, taking them to the planet Karlinus for a new life.[655]
  • Forces of the Separatist Droid Army besiege the major population centers of the unaligned, resource-rich planet Hebekrr Major, hoping to claim it for the Separatists. A company of the Grand Army of the Republic, led by Jedi General Sivad and Clone Commander Sticks, defend the civilians of the planet from the attacks.[655]
  • High Jedi General Obi-Wan Kenobi, Clone Commander "Cody," Jedi Commander Anakin Skywalker, and clone trooper "Sister" battle Separatist droids together.[656][657]
  • A sudden strike on Bracca is carried out by the Confederacy of Independent Systems, The Republic sends a battalion of clone troopers led by newly promoted Jedi Knight Cyruss Okent to respond to the attack.[656][657]
  • Following a Confederacy attack on the resource-rich planet Langston that devastated the world's infrastructure, a Jedi-Republic aid mission is led by newly-promoted Jedi Knights Anakin Skywalker and D'urban Wen-Hurd, who are assisted by the 302nd Battalion.[656][657]
  • The Cadesura disaster takes place on Cato Neimoidia. Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker embark on a mission to Cato Neimoidia, where they first meet Asajj Ventress.[656][657]
  • The Jedi Knights are made Jedi Generals of the Republic.[656][657]
  • Operation on Hissrich; Mace Windu brings a Jedi strike force consisting of himself, Kit Fisto, Prosset Dibs, and Rissa Mano to the planet Hissrich to stop a Separatist mining operation.[658]
  • A pair of Confederate gunships ambush a Republic troop transport, causing it to crash and killing or injuring the majority of the clone troopers on board. One of the survivors, Cut Lawquane, flees and deserts the Republic during the battle.[659]
  • Knighted to fight in the Clone Wars,[32] Jedi General Anakin Skywalker leads Clone Captain Rex in the Battle of Arantara.[660][661]
  • Anakin Skywalker gains a scar by his right eye.[661]
  • Anakin Skywalker leads the 501st Legion on a mission to the planet Benglor in an investigation of Separatist activity. They discover traces of Separatist battle droids, but are attacked by a hostile creature that kills clone trooper Bellow. [662][661]
  • Battle of Corvair, in the Corvair sector. Skywalker's forces discover and destroy a Separatist droid factory on Kudo III with the assistance of Admiral Wullf Yularen.[663][661][664]
  • Jedi General Plo Koon and the Wolfpack lead a mission to Quarmendy; the Nexus trading post is destroyed by Separatist leader Emir Wat Tambor.[665]
  • The Separatist siege the planet Hisseen; Republic forces are sent to prevent the fall of the planet to Confederate hands after the Separatists take the Hisseenian parliament hostage.[662]
  • The Battle of Christophsis ensues as Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi send supplies to Senator Bail Organa and his relief effort on Christophsis.[574][666][667]
  • Rotta, son of Jabba the Hutt, is kidnapped by Dooku's assassin, Asajj Ventress. The blame is then placed on the Republic by the Separatists in an attempt to destroy the former's reputation with the Hutts, in the hopes that Hutt Space could be opened up to themselves for their war efforts against the Republic.[666]
  • Anakin Skywalker takes Ahsoka Tano as his Padawan on Christophsis.[666]
  • Dispatched by Ziro the Hutt, KRONOS-327 fails in his assassination mission to the twelfth moon of Yout.[666]
  • The Grand Army of the Republic assault a B'omarr Monastery in Hutt-controlled Teth where Rotta the Hutt was being held by Ventress and Separatist forces. Rotta is rescued and his kidnapping by the Separatist uncovered.[666]
  • Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano return Rotta to Jabba the Hutt on Tatooine after taking down IG-100 MagnaGuards and dueling Count Dooku, leading to a Hutt Clan–Republic treaty.[666]
  • After traveling to Ziro Desilijic Tiure's nightclub, which doubled as his palace, Senator Padmé Amidala overhears Ziro conspiring with Count Dooku. She is captured and taken to the palace dungeon, where she is able to contact her protocol droid, C-3PO, who contacts the Coruscant Guard. They dispatch a team, led by Clone Commander Fox, to storm the palace. The senator is rescued and Ziro is arrested.[666]
  • Ryloth is invaded by Separatist forces; the Battle of Ryloth begins between the invading droid army and a Twi'lek Resistance led by General Cham Syndulla.[668][667]
  • Republic Senator Bail Organa and Junior Representative Jar Jar Binks persuade Toydaria's government to allow for the planet to be used as a staging ground for relief supplies to be delivered to the embattled Ryloth.[668]
  • The Ambush on Rugosa occurs. Through perseverance and humor, Jedi Master Yoda brought inspiration to three clone troopers against even the full force of Asajj Ventress' army, thus securing the allegiance of the Toydarian king Katuunko for the Republic.[669][667]
  • Count Dooku and General Grievous launch a multy-month campaign using Grievous's flagship, the Subjugator-class heavy cruiser Malevolence. It features two mega-ion cannons, which can be used to knock out entire Republic fleets.[670][59]
    • At the battle of Abregado, Jedi General Plo Koon's fleet of Venator-class Star Destroyers discovers the Malevolence. As Koon's fleet attempts to contact Republic forces, the fleet is fired upon by the Malevolence's ion cannon. The entire fleet is disabled and quickly torn apart by turbolasers.[671]
    • A Republic medical convoy of three Pelta-class frigates escorted by a lone Venator-class Star Destroyer, commanded by clone troopers and a Jedi, is ambushed while passing through the Ryndellia system. The entire convoy is eliminated.[672]
    • The Malevolence targets the Republic's secret medical station near the Kaliida Nebula, whith more than sixty-thousand wounded clone troopers being tended to by the Kaminoan doctor Nala Se. Anakin Skywalker leads a squadron of BTL-B Y-wing starfighter/bombers at the resulting Battle of the Kaliida Nebula, where the Malevolence is destroyed.[673]
    • Jedi General Luminara Unduli's fleet group intercepts a fleet of Separatist reinforcements that had been sent to aid Grievous in the Kaliida Nebula.[673]
  • By this point, Captain Rex and Commander Cody were assisted by Jedi on Tibrin.[674]
  • The 501st Legion and the 224th Clone Division's Mud Jumpers under Jedi General Laan Tik, in addition to a Republic trained and assisted mimbanese tribe, fight in Mimban against a Separatist droid army. While in combat, the 224th's Mud Jumpers were given a song by a Hologram VJ of the Grand Army of the Republic broadcast.[674][660]
  • The Republic outpost known as Rishi Station on the Rishi Moon is defended from a Separatist infiltration by the clone troopers stationed there, preventing a Separatist invasion of Kamino.[674]
  • General Grievous, leader of the Separatist Droid Army, initiates a military campaign using intelligence from Skytop Station, a Trade Federation core ship and battlesphere repurposed as a listening post, and operated by the Hyper-Communications Cartel from the orbit of the Ruusan moon.[675]
    • Grievous invades several planets and blockades several vital hyperspace routes leading to Bespin, Kessel, and Mon Calamari.[676]
    • Separatist forces take control of the planet Falleen and the Republic's battle group stationed there is lost to the invasion.[675]
    • Republic and Confederacy fleets engage near the planet Bothawui. The Republic achieves a strategic victory, securing Bothawui and preventing Separatist advancements in the Mid Rim Territories. However, R2-D2 is lost and presumed destroyed.[675]
    • The Vulture's Claw, a GS-100 salvage ship owned by the Trandoshan scavenger Gha Nachkt, retrieves R2-D2 from the debris of the Battle of Bothawui. Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano investigate the Vulture's Claw for R2-D2, to no avail.[675]
    • Anakin Skywalker, while on a mission to scout ahead for Separatist activity in the outer corridor of a selected region of space, is ambushed by Confederacy warships. He is rescued by Captain Rex and a squad of clone troopers aboard the Twilight.[675]
    • After learning of the existence and location of Skytop Station, the Republic launches a raid where R2-D2 is rescued by Anakin Skywalker and the station is destroyed.[677]
  • Padmé Amidala goes on diplomatic mission to Rodia after the planet's supplies are attacked by pirates, to ensure that the planet remains allied with the Republic. Yet, Onaconda Farr, Rodia's Senator, had allied himself with Nute Gunray and the Confederacy in exchange for supplies. Upon her arrival in the Senatorial Palace on Rodia, Amidala is taken captive, to be given to Gunray as part of the arrangement. After arriving to collect Amidala, the viceroy reveals that he intends to execute her, and Farr begins to distrust him. Amidala breaks out of her cell, and C-3PO is able to contact Republic clone troopers for support. Gunray is apprehended by Amidala and Farr and taken into custody. Rodia remains allied to the Republic, and Palpatine dispatches relief supplies to the planet.[678][679]
  • On Naboo, Queen Jamillia's reign ends and Neeyutnee is elected to her first term.[21]
21 BBY[]
  • Viceroy Nute Gunray is rescued on the Venator-class Star Destroyer Tranquility from Galactic Republic custody by Separatist forces with the help of Republic traitor Captain Faro Argyus, who is later executed by Ventress.[680][681]
  • Kit Fisto, Jedi Knight Nahdar Vebb, and a squad of clone troopers undertake a mission to recapture Nute Gunray. However, Dooku, displeased with General Grievous's recent failures in the war, used a Republic homing beacon to lure the Jedi and clones to the general's castle on the third moon of Vassek as a test for Grievous. All Republic forces are eliminated except for Fisto, who escapes.[682][681]
  • The Republic attempts to capture Dooku. Anakin Skywalker allows himself to be taken prisoner aboard Dooku's frigate while in an ice field and Obi-Wan Kenobi infiltrates the frigate when it is later in space over Vanqor, freeing Skywalker. The two Jedi find and confront Dooku, but as the Republic Star Destroyer Resolute opens fire on the frigate, the Sith Lord flees from the ship in his solar sailer. Skywalker and Kenobi steal a transport shuttle and pursue the count, but both the Jedi and Sith's ships are damaged and forced to crash-land on Vanqor, where Dooku traps the Jedi in a cave and manages to escape.[683][681]
  • The pirate captain Hondo Ohnaka captures Kenobi, Skywalker, and Dooku, and the Republic agrees to pay Ohnaka and his gang a ransom in exchange of the prisoners. A group led by Senator Kharrus, Jar Jar Binks, and Clone Commander Stone travel to Ohnaka's base of operations on the planet Florrum, but their shuttle is shot down by a group of pirates led by Turk Falso, a lieutenant of Ohnaka who wanted the ransom for himself, killing Kharrus and the pilots. However, Binks and the clones manage to stop Falso and his men, eventually reaching the prison camp where Skywalker and Kenobi where held and liberating them. Dooku escapes.[684][681]
  • Jedi General Aayla Secura's task force is destroyed in the Battle of Quell, but she is rescued by Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano.[685][681]
  • With war brought to their doorstep, the pacifist Lurmen side with a group of stranded Jedi and Republic soldiers in the defense of their village on the planet Maridun from Separatist battle droids led by Neimoidian General Lok Durd.[686][681]
  • The native Talz of Orto Plutonia are caught in the Clone Wars,[687] leading to the One-Day War between the Talz and the Pantorans. Pantoran Senator Riyo Chuchi negotiates peace with the Talz, conceding Orto Plutonia's sovereignty to the natives.[687][681]
  • Senator Amidala and Representative Binks investigate the Blue Shadow Virus and lead the raid on the laboratory of Doctor Nuvo Vindi. He is arrested and the virus outbreak is contained.[688][681]
  • Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker travel to the planet Iego to retrieve reeksa root, the only known cure for the Blue Shadow Virus. They liberate the planet from the Ghost of Drol.[689][690]
  • The Republic manages to break through the Ryloth blockade during its counteroffensive to liberate the planet Ryloth from the Confederacy of Independent Systems.[691][667]
  • The city of Nabat on Ryloth, seized by the Confederacy and its inhabitants taken hostage, is liberated by Obi-Wan Kenobi and the clone troopers from Ghost Company.[692][667]
  • With Ryloth liberated from Separatist occupation and Republic Military presence established on the planet, the Battle of Ryloth ends.[693][667]
  • The Confederacy of Independent Systems is victorius in the First Battle of Felucia, forcing Republic forces to retreat from the planet.[694][695]
  • Hired by Darth Sidious, Cad Bane takes on a Raid on the Jedi Temple, where he steals a holocron necessary for accessing the kyber memory crystal, which contained the names of future Jedi younglings.[694][695]
  • During the battle of Devaron, Rodian Jedi Master Bolla Ropal, keeper of the Kyber memory crystal, is captured by Separatist commanded by Cad Bane, who tortures Ropal to death over Deveraon after the Jedi's refusal to give the bounty hunter access to the memory crystal. Bane instead threatens to kill Ahsoka Tano and thus forces Anakin Skywalker to do so at the battle before escaping.[696][695]
  • Cad Bane embarks on a series of kidnappings of Force-sensitive children listed in the memory crystal, taking potential younglings from Glee Anselm, Rodia, and Naboo. However, Bane is intercepted by Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano at Naboo's underwater Jan-gwa city,[697][695] which gains local notoriety as a result.[86]
  • Mace Windu and Obi-Wan Kenobi take charge of Skywalker and Tano's mission, tracing Cad Bane to his secret hideout, Black Stall Station, in an attempt to capture the kidnapper and liberate the stolen children. However, they fail, only retrieving the stolen holocron and its memory crystal, though Skywalker takes Tano to a secret facility on Mustafar, which he found to be the location of the captured infants. They ultimately foil Darth Sidious' plan to create an army of Force-talented spies in his service, and rescue the two kidnapped children.[697][695]
  • The Confederacy of Independent Systems destroys the Felucia Medical Station HCTFF2, a Republic Haven-class medical station orbiting Felucia. After losing contact with the station the Republic deploys Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker, and Ahsoka Tano in a T-6 shuttle to investigate. They are detected and attacked by an automated vulture droid deployment station, leading them to crash into the planet.[698][699]
  • Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano join a group of bounty hunters led by Sugi in a defense of a farming village in Felucia from pirates.[698][699]
  • The Confederacy of Independent Systems attempts to deplete the Galactic Republic's fuel supply by sending a massive army to conquer the planet Malastare. During the resulting battle, the separatist army is deactivated by a prototype electro-proton bomb designed by Republic scientist Sionver Boll. This opens up a large sinkhole that causes the Zillo Beast to awaken. [628][699][59]
  • The Zillo Beast is transported to Coruscant for study, as the Republic's scientific community and Chancellor Palpatine both desired to study the beast's invulnerable scales to create impenetrable armor for the Grand Army of the Republic. The beast escapes and goes on a rampage across the city, it is ultimately killed by a bombardment of poisonous gas from a number of LAAT/is, but not before killing and injuring many clone troopers and civilians.[700][699]
  • Padmé Amidala, while on diplomatic mission to Cato Neimoidia, is able to discover the existence of the Geonosis primary droid factory.[701][699]
  • General Grievous attacks Anakin Skywalker's forces near Dorin, with the objective of distract Republic forces from traveling to Geonosis, which the Republic had learned was the site of a new droid factory. Republic starfighter squadrons are able to rout Grievous's forces.[702][699]
  • Provoked by Poggle the Lesser's droid foundries on Geonosis producing new weapons for the Separatists,[591] the Republic initiates the Second Battle of Geonosis.[702][679][699]
    • Beneath the Progate Temple, the Jedi and the Republic kill Karina the Great, the Queen of Geonosis. Poggle the Lesser returns to Republic custody.[591]
  • As Supreme Chancellor Palpatine, Darth Sidious presents the battle station plans given to him by Dooku at the outbreak of the Clone War to the Republic Strategic Advisory Cell, which begins building the battle station in secret over Geonosis with unlimited funding for fear that the Separatist Alliance was developing a similar weapon elsewhere.[76]
  • Jedi General Mace Windu oversees the Galactic Republic's defense on the planet Dantooine against the Separatist Droid Army. Windu's forces withstand the attack but require medical supplies as a result of their efforts.[703][699]
  • Clone trooper Scythe, infected by a brain worm while on Geonosis, brings a backpack full of the parasites onboard the Pelta-class frigate TB-73 en route to the Ord Cestus medical station. Scythe infects most of the other clones onboard with the worms, and the infected clones kill the frigate's two pilots. Barriss Offee is captured and infected, leaving Ahsoka Tano as the only un-infested individual on board. After getting in contact with Anakin Skywalker, she learns that the worms, coming from a hot planet, are vulnerable to the cold, so ruptures the coolant systems to flood the ship and bring the temperature down, incapacitating the clones.[703][699]
  • During a space battle within the Saleucami system, Jedi Master Eeth Koth is captured by General Grievous and taken captive to Saleucami.[704][699]
  • The Battle of Saleucami occurs. Jedi Councilor Eeth Koth is rescued from Grievous' Separatist forces in the Saleucami system by Republic forces led by Adi Gallia, Obi-Wan Kenobi, and Anakin Skywalker.[704][699]
  • After the Battle of Saleucami and before the end of the Clone Wars
    • While Koth is part of the High Council, the mission to Enthenium occurs; Yoda duels Grievous and finds that Operation: Titan is underway on Golatha.[705] There, he and Anakin Skywalker battle the Separatists' new megadroid.[706]
    • Koth is eventually forced to step down from the High Council and decides to leave the Jedi Order, being replaced by Agen Kolar on the Council by the end of the Clone Wars[707] and retiring as a priest in the Church of the Ganthic Enlightenment.[708]
    • The Separatist Alliance leads an invasion of Saleucami, hoping to use the planet as an outpost, staging area, and trans-shipment point for the Salin Corridor hyperspace route.[76]
    • A surprise assault takes place on Roche in the Mid Rim, the smuggler Has Obitt is caught in the middle of the attack.[76]
  • A saboteur member of the Mandalorian Death Watch and acting with support from the Separatist Alliance, launches an attack on a Republic cruiser located in a shipyard. Upon being discovered, he exchanges fire with Republic forces before choosing to take his own life. In response, the Jedi High Council dispatches Obi-Wan Kenobi to the planet Mandalore to speak with Duchess Satine Kryze, the leader of the pacifistic New Mandalorians. While on Mandalore, Kenobi leeds an investigation to discover if Kryze, the planet, or the New Mandalorians had joined the Confederacy.[79][699]
  • While Duchess Satine and Obi-Wan Kenobi stroll through the gardens at Peace Park on Sundari, a bomb is set off by a member of Death Watch that destroys the New Mandalorian Memorial Shrine. The bomber runs off to flee, but is cornered by the Jedi at a balcony. Rather than being arrested, the bomber jumps off the balcony to commit suicide.[79][699]
  • Kenobi and Satine go on a diplomatic mission to Mandalore's moon Concordia to confer with the local governor, Pre Vizsla. They are ambushed by Death Watch warriors and Pre Vizsla is exposed as the Overlord of the Death Watch. He had been conspiring with Count Dooku, who had been backing the Death Watch in an attempt to destabilize the pacifist government of the New Mandalorians.[79][699]
  • After Vizsla reveals himself as Death Watch's leader, Kryze along with Senator Tal Merrik and others go aboard the Coronet to speak to the Republic Senate in order to convince them of Mandalore's neutrality. Kenobi, along with Anakin Skywalker and detachments of clone troopers from the 212th Attack Battalion and the 501st Legion accompany Kryze and her party to protect them from Death Watch and a force of B2-series super battle droids.[547][699]
  • Death Watch engineer a bombing on Kalevala, a planet located in the Mandalore system, that kills Jerec, the New Mandalorian Deputy Minister. Later on that day, the attack is addressed in the Galactic Senate by Supreme Chancellor Sheev Palpatine.[709][699]
  • A Death Watch assassin sets out to assassinate Duchess Satine Kryze while she is on Coruscant attempting to preserve Mandalore's neutrality in the Clone Wars. The assassin fails, allowing Mandalore to stay neutral and preventing Death Watch's plan to take over the planet.[709][699]
  • Boba Fett and a team of bounty hunters sabotage the Venator-class Star Destroyer Endurance in an attempt to kill Jedi Master Mace Windu. The Endurance crashes on the planet Vanqor. [710][699]
  • Mace Windu and Anakin Skywalker search the wreckage of the Endurance for any survivors. The bounty hunters, already there, had killed the surviving clone troopers, took three Republic officers as hostages and set up a booby trap that leaves Skywalker and Windu trapped in the wreckage. Plo Koon and Ahsoka Tano go to Vanqor with the clone troopers of the 104th Battalion to rescue the trapped Jedi [711][699]
  • Plo Koon and Ahsoka Tano confront Boba Fett and his allies in Florrum. The hostages are freed, Boba Fett and Bossk are arrested, and Aurra Sing is presumed dead.[712][699]
  • New Mandalorian Prime Minister Almec, in league with a Mooga smuggling ring, initiates a conspiracy to use the black market to smuggle supplies onto the planet Mandalore, lining his own pockets in the process.[713][699]
  • After Duchess Satine, Padmé Amidala, Captain Patrok Ru-Saxon of the Mandalorian Guard, and a force of his men investigate criminal activity at a warehouse at the Sundari shipping docks, a shootout between the Moogan smugglers and the Mandalorian Guard ensues. The Moogans are arrested and Ru-Saxon orders the facility that the smugglers were using to be burned to the ground.[713][699]
  • A civil war takes place on the planet Balith, leading to requested intervention from the Galactic Republic. Under orders of the Jedi High Council, Anakin Skywalker and the Grand Army's Third Legion are dispatched to the conflict.[714][699]
  • A diplomatic conference is held by members of the Senate on Alderaan during the to address the growing number of refugees who were displaced by the Republic's war against the Confederacy. During the conference bounty hunter Aurra Sing, under contract from the aligned Separatist Ziro the Hutt, attempts to assassinate Padmé Amidala, but is stopped by Ahsoka Tano and arrested.[714][699]
