The 204th's Lyttan Dree and Zin Graw are killed amidst an attack by the Rebel Alliance after Graw, secretly wanting to defect to the rebels, leaked intelligence to the Alliance.[1079][21]
    • Leia Organa travels to Ord Mantell to find Maz Kanata for assistance in rescuing Han Solo. Boushh attacks Organa, though the bounty hunter was defeated by the latter, who took from Kanata's teachings of patience. Organa wears Boushh's armor as a disguise, thanking Maz Kanata before leaving in the Millennium Falcon with Chewbacca and R2-D2.[1303][1304]
    • Boushh attempts to blackmail Black Sun. He fails and falls to agents of the crime syndicate, though his demise is not well-known.[1305][1304]
    • Leia Organa, disguised as Boushh, rescues Lando Calrissian from bounty hunters on Arkanis. One hunter, Bossk, attempts to capture Chewbacca, although the Wookiee is later rescued. Organa thus cements Boushh's reputation with Bossk.[1306]
    • With the Millennium Falcon, Lando Calrissian and Chewbacca attempt to find Han Solo,[1161] eventually arriving at Jabba's Palace.[1307]
    • The After the Rebel Alliance discovers a meeting of the Imperial Navy in the Hudalla system five X-wings of Corona Squadron are sent to survey the system, where they engage in a dogfight with four TIE/IN interceptors sent by Admiral Firmus Piett, who suspected a rebel presence. Piett gave Commander Ciena Ree secret orders to let at least one of the Rebels escape, in order to set the trap at Endor.[649]
    • Less than one week before Operation Yellow Moon, Bothan operatives obtain footage of the second Death Star at Endor.[1096] The Bothans bring the information to the Rebellion's Mon Mothma, Gial Ackbar, and Airen Cracken at the cost of many lives.[1307]
    • Rebel intelligence chief and general Airen Cracken's men report a confirmed sighting of Boba Fett's ship over Tatooine, and that Fett has been paid for the delivery of Han Solo and is continuing to work for Jabba the Hutt.[1096]
    • With the Rebellion's fleet still scattered across the galaxy to prevent another major defeat, the rebel convoy protecting Princess Leia Organa withstands an attack by Imperial forces.[1096]
    • Rebels on Zastiga
      • Mon Mothma orders members of Rebel High Command to convene on Zastiga. Aboard the Mellcrawler, Nien Nunb transports Leia Organa, Caluan Ematt, and C-3PO to Zastiga, where they join Luke Skywalker and R2-D2.[1096]
      • On Zastiga, while Mon Mothma, Gial Ackbar, Airen Cracken, Crix Madine, Leia Organa, Carlist Rieekan, and a number of top admirals and generals—amongst them Nantz and Massa, as well as Veertag and Tantor—meet at a safe house to discuss the second Death Star, Luke Skywalker, Wedge Antilles, and Nien Nunb meet for a discussion of how Nunb saved Antilles at Hagar Secundus.[1096]
      • Luke Skywalker, who had rejected Antilles' offer for him to rejoin Red Squadron[1308] and had been delaying his return to Yoda on Dagobah to await news of Han Solo, expects that he would return to the Redemption. Skywalker also tells Leia Organa of his need to master patience to become a Jedi.[1096]
      • The next day, taking from Skywalker's lesson, Organa proposes Operation Yellow Moon to buy much-needed time for the Rebellion and the galaxy at the risk of her life. Mon Mothma approves of the proposal after telling Organa not to deny herself another chance at love; duty cannot provide the comfort love would bring.[1096]
      • Rebels leave Zastiga the following day.[1096]
    • Operation Yellow Moon; Aboard Nien Nunb's Mellcrawler, Leia Organa leads a faux Alliance recruiting mission in the Corva sector, nearly a hundred-thousand light years away from the second Death Star, that is meant to distract the Empire while the Rebellion gathers an armada at Sullust.[1096]
      • Imperials led by Captain Khione garrison Basteel and Sesid in retaliation for Organa attempting to recruit for the Alliance on the two worlds, imposing greater fear and oppression on their populace in the goal of instilling absolute obedience.[1096]
      • Unwilling to cause more lives of others to be lost while doing their duty for the fate of the Rebellion and the galaxy, Organa's crew decide to go beyong their mission parameters and assist in a civilian uprising against the Empire on Jaresh, ensuring that the local resistance succeeds.[1096]
      • Organa's crew proceed to the Yellow Moon, over which rebel recruits from the Corva sector are set to rendezvous as arranged by the Rebel Alliance. The Mellcrawler broadcasts a message to the gathered rebels that they are only a distraction for a major upcoming Alliance battle elsewhere, and telling them to flee. As the rebels leave, Captain Khione's Imperial flagship, the Shieldmaiden, arrives and captures the Mellcrawler.[1096]
      • With the individual voluntary sacrifices of two members of Organa's crew, as well as a surprise return of the rebel recruits, the crew destroys the Shieldmaiden using the Mellcrawler as a bomb, escaping Khione's Star Destroyer with a stolen Imperial shuttle named Tydirium.[1096]
    • Aboard the shuttle Tydirium, Leia Organa, Nien Nunb, and Kidi Aleri reach Kothlis, where they join Luke Skywalker. Skywalker reports that they had gathered that Han Solo is still in carbonite, held at Jabba's Palace.[1096]
    • Iden Versio escapes from the Invincible Faith with Moff Derrek Raythe's message, in which Death Squadron is ordered to move to the far side of Endor as part of the Empire's plans to trap the Rebel Alliance during what the rebels think to be their surprise assault on the Emperor's new battle station.[1309]
    • With his green-bladed lightsaber, Luke Skywalker leads a raid at Imperial Refining Platform M36 to secure an entire year's worth of fuel supplies for the Rebel Alliance. With the rebels skeptical of Skywalker for his Force abilities sometimes giving false positives of potential threats, the rebels refuse to heed Skywalker's call to risk jumping into hyperspace and are attacked by an Imperial Star Destroyer as a result. Skywalker resists Darth Sidious' telepathic urges to abandon the rebels for being weak and the temptation to leave the war to live a quiet life, rejoining the rebels aboard their transport. Controlling his anger that festered from his guilt of nearly abandoning the rebels, Skywalker assists their leader in helping the rebels escape to safety.[1310]
    • While a battle between the Empire and the Alliance takes place in the world Mordal's city of Maborn, the Ballast family becomes trapped in the area of contention, and the daughter of Corwin Ballast and his wife Lynnta die in the firefight. The battle ends without a decisive victor, with the combatants choosing to halt hostilities.[28]
    • Rescue of Han Solo; on Tatooine, Han Solo is rescued from Jabba the Hutt, who is killed by Leia Organa. Boba Fett is consumed by the sarlacc of the Great Pit of Carkoon.[1307]
    • Jabba's demise leads to the fall of his criminal empire.
      • EV-9D9 is temporarily disabled[1311] but later becomes a bartender at Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina by[1312] 9 ABY.[1313]
    • Lando Calrissian defeats a pirate fleet at the Battle of Taanab, earning himself the rank of general in the Rebel Alliance.[92]
    • Squadron Five is replenished with the newly graduated Bansu Ro and Rac Syrmo and destroys the rebel recruitment base traced from Zin Graw's leak.[1080]
    • Yoda dies on Dagobah; Luke Skywalker discovers that he is not only truly the son of Darth Vader, but also the brother of Leia Organa.[1307]
    • By this point, the rebels had fought the Spice Runners of Kijimi, whose leader, Zarah Bliss, is replaced by Zeva Bliss.[1314]
    • The Alliance Fleet gathers in the Sullust system; days before their offensive, the Spice Runners had been bribed and manipulated by the Empire to set up an assassination attempt on Mon Mothma, but it is foiled by rebel spy Tomasso, Shara Bey, and Kes Dameron. Tomasso additionally informs Mothma that the Imperial leadership is aboard the second Death Star.[1314]
    • A strike team led by Alliance General Han Solo lands on the Forest Moon of Endor with the shuttle Tydirium. They gather Ewok allies from Bright Tree Village.[1307]
    • Luke Skywalker tells Leia Organa that they are siblings and that Darth Vader is their father. Luke Skywalker then leaves to confront Vader himself, attempting to join forces with him to fight against the Emperor as Jedi.[1307]
    • Battle of Endor[1307]
      • Departing Sullust, the Alliance Fleet flies into the trap set for them by the Emperor in the Endor system. Led by Admiral Ackbar from aboard the Home One, the rebels destroy the Executor.[1307]
      • Han Solo's strike team and Ewok allies destroy the Death Star's shield generator, allowing rebel starfighters to infiltrate the Death Star's reactor core.[1307]
      • Vader duels his son in the Emperor's Throne Room, but is defeated by the furious Jedi, whom Darth Sidious wishes to turn to the dark side as his new apprentice. Realizing his own fear and anger, Luke Skywalker throws away his lightsaber and refuses to kill Vader. While Sidious attempts to destroy the Jedi, Darth Vader's compassion for his son overwhelms him, and, resuming his duty to the Force as the Chosen One, Anakin Skywalker kills his former Sith Master at the cost of his own life. By destroying the Sith, Anakin brings balance to the Force and passes away in peace, and Luke Skywalker escapes from the Death Star as a true Jedi.[1307]
      • The second Death Star is destroyed by the Millennium Falcon.[1307]

Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY)[]

  • 4 ABY
    • Concurrent to the Battle of Endor
      • An Imperial armada launches a surprise attack on the Core Worlds, though it is defeated at the border of the Hosnian system by two Rebel MC75 Star Cruisers; the Accordance and the Temperance. The Accordance is lost, although the Temperance rescues some survivors.[1315]
    • Hours after the Battle of Endor
      • TIE fighters and TIE strikers from the forces of Moff Ubrik Adelhard ambush a Rebel Alliance squadron that had entered the Anoat sector. Nearly all of the Alliance squadron escapes the battle, but is trapped in the Anoat sector. The pilot Rynn Zenat escapes to Endor after her ship appears to have been shot down, and the Alliance learns of the Iron Blockade.[1316]
    • Soon after the Battle of Endor
      • News of the deaths of the Emperor and Darth Vader as well as the destruction of the second Death Star and the Executor at the Rebellion's hands are broadcast across the galaxy.[28]
      • Luke Skywalker gives his late father a funeral on Endor, and Anakin Skywalker joins Yoda and Obi-Wan Kenobi as Force spirits.[1307]
      • Moff Adelhard, commanding his flagship Star Destroyer Scepter, engages in a skirmish with Rebel Alliance Navy forces that had entered the Anoat sector. After managing to disable the Alliance starfighters, the Imperials destroy all rebel starships, leaving no survivors.[1316]
      • Celebrations of the Empire's fall at Endor takes place throughout the galaxy, including bonfires in Bright Tree Village, gatherings on Cloud City, a rally on Naboo, and parades on Tatooine.[1307] However, celebrations on Coruscant lead to a crackdown at Monument Plaza, sparking the Coruscant civil war.[28]
      • Rebel celebrants including Chewbacca, Lando Calrissian, Mon Mothma, Hera Syndulla and Ewoks Chirpa and Logray attend the wedding of Han Solo and Leia Organa, officiated by Luke Skywalker and celebrated at Bright Tree Village.[30]
      • Billions of sentient beings are conceived in direct celebration of the Battle of Endor, leading to the large generation of victory kids.[1317]
    • One day after the Battle of Endor
      • Han Solo leads the Pathfinders and some Ewok warriors in an assault on an Imperial outpost on the far side of Endor. Once inside, they gather intelligence revealing the Empire's future plans, indicating that the war with the Empire is not yet over.[1318]
    • The Rebel pilots of Rampant Squadron, assisted by Lieutenant Shara Bey, liberate the Beltire system from the Empire.[1319]
    • After the after-party's after-party on Endor
      • While Han Solo and Leia Organa enjoy their time on Endor[1320] and would later go on a honeymoon aboard the Halcyon,[1321] Lando Calrissian, Chewbacca, Nien Nunb, and Shriv Suurgav undertake a mission to Neskar Station aboard the Millennium Falcon. With the battle-racer Sebulba in debt to the Hutts and having connections to pirates who have been robbing rebel supply lines, the rebels contact Sebulba over Neskar and acquire a lead on the pirates.[1320]
    • Seventeen days after the Battle of Endor
      • Cawa City, on the planet Sterdic IV, is liberated from the Empire by the Rebellion's Feral Group and Green Squadron led by Lieutenant L'ulo L'ampar, after heavy starfighter losses.[1319]
    • Sentinel droids are dispatched to select Imperial leaders to ensure the execution of the fallen Emperor's Contingency. Relaying Palpatine's will, they decree the initiation of Operation: Cinder.[1309]
    • As Moff Derrek Raythe's Imperial-class Star Destroyer Dauntless prepares to depart the Imperial dockyard at one of the Fondor Shipyards' stations, with experimental satellites meant for Operation: Cinder in tow, while the special commando unit Inferno Squad overses its protection, a rebel fleet attacks Fondor Station. The MC80 Star Cruiser within the fleet disables the Dauntless with its ion cannons, leaving the Star Destroyer defenseless. To prevent the rebels from learning about the satellites' true purpose, Inferno Squad and several TIE fighters are deployed to engage the rebel ships. Inferno Squad defends the Dauntless from U-wing transports attempting to board the Destroyer. Iden Versio infiltrates the rebel Star Cruiser's weapons bay and sabotages its ion cannons with the assistance of Agent Gideon Hask. Upon leaving the Cruiser, Versio continues to defend the Dauntless and frees it by destroying the docking clamps holding the ship in place. The battle ends in an Imperial victory when the Destroyer cripples the rebel Cruiser with its turbolasers and departs Fondor Station with the satellites intact.[1309]
    • Posing undercover as smugglers, Rebel operatives travel to the fringe of Anoat Sector in the Oggrud, an explosive laden Barloz-class freighter. The ship is intercepted by a fleet of Spice Runner ships commanded by Zeva Bliss, who seek to ally themselves with Ubrik Adelhard's coalition. Spice Runner lieutenant Vigilch demands the Rebel operatives allow the Spice Runners to board their ship or be destroyed. Rather than surrender, Rynn Zenat ramms the Oggrud into the Spice Runner ships, triggering massive explosions. Adelhard's Specter later arrives at the battlefield, where they discover the Spice Runners have sustained significant damage in the Oggrud's attack. Bliss's flagship, the Ragged Claw remains functional, but all other Spice Runner ships are gone or beyond repair. All four members of the investigation team survive the encounter. Adelhard's forces are able to recover the crew from the freighter's escape pod and take them prisoner onboard the Specter. The crew is later freed from their cell by undercover New Republic spy Kith Alaytia. However, before they can escape, are confronted by Adelhard's enforcers Bragh and Reyna Oskure, and incapacitated.[1322]
    • Imperial Special Forces Agent Del Meeko, accompanied by several squads of stormtroopers, travels to the planet Pillio to destroy the Emperor's Observatory, and stop the valuable relics hidden there from falling into the hands of the enemies. Luke Skywalker, meanwhile, feels called to the planet by the Force, and goes to investigate. Ultimately all the Imperial forces are wiped out, save for Agent Del Meeko. The observatory is not destroyed, and Skywalker recovers a compass.[1309]
    • At Kestro City on the planet Vardos, Iden Versio and Del Meeko disobey their orders to return the Aqualish Gleb alone to Admiral Garrick Versio, instead choosing to save 43 civilians as well. This act is seen as treasonous, and Gideon Hask and Garrick attempt to have Meeko and Iden killed. Meanwhile, the city descends into rioting as the inhabitants realize they are being left to die by the Empire. Iden and Del fight their way through the Imperial forces back to their ship, the Corvus, before escaping off-world and eventually sending a distress call to the Rebel Alliance.[1309]
    • Twenty days after the Battle of Endor
      • Imperial forces launch Operation: Cinder against Naboo. At this point, Sosha Soruna had become the Queen of Naboo.[1319] Leia Organa coordinates resistance efforts in the streets of Theed.[1309]
      • The Pathfinders, led by Han Solo, raid an Imperial Security Bureau black site at the Wretch of Tayron.[1323] After entering the base and accesing the Imperial files, the Rebellion gains the intelligence needed to discover and fight against Operation: Cinder.[1324]
    • Three months after the Battle of Endor[1325]
      • Two fragments of the Great Tree, that once dwelled at the heart of the Coruscant Jedi Temple, are retrieved from an Imperial base on the planet Vetine by Luke Skywalker and Lieutenant Shara Bey. Skywalker takes one of the tree fragments but gives the second to Bey and her family.[1326]
      • Imperial forces launches Operation: Cinder against Abednedo, Burnin Konn, Candovant, and Commenor. (Approximate date)[1326]
  • Weeks following the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined)
    • The 204th carries out Operation: Cinder on Nacronis, wiping out its inhabitants despite the Rebel Alliance's efforts to save the world. Yrica Quell of the 204th deserts as a result, and would later be found by the New Republic.[1327]
    • The 204th attacks the Hellion's Dare, a New Republic Nebulon-B frigate captained by the Chadra-Fan Kreskian, while in orbit above the planet Jiruus. Both Riot and Hound Squadrons scramble to defend the frigate before escaping to hyperspace.[1328]
  • Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined)
    • Darth Sidious is reborn within a clone body in Exegol's Sith Citadel, but the clone body rapidly decays in his Sith Eternal's care.[1329] They install Snoke into the galaxy.[59]
    • Rebels depart their outpost on D'Qar.[1023]
    • Leia Organa begins training in the ways of the Force on Ajan Kloss, per her choice of location, under the tutelage of her brother, Luke Skywalker.[1330]
    • During the Alliance to Restore the Republic's existence
      • Imperial Governor Ubrik Adelhard locks down the Anoat sector under the Iron Blockade. Deprived of the Rebellion's help, those trapped inside the blockade start an uprising.[1331]
      • The New Republic liberates the planet Sullust from the Empire after months of fighting. After the battle, Admiral Gial Ackbar and Mon Mothma escort Councillor Sian Tevv into the government center for his ceremonial inauguration.[567]
      • The self–proclaimed Grand Moff Valco Pandion abandons the Imperial communications station on Malastare, causing the Empire to lose its foothold on the planet. The Alliance's Blade Squadron, led by Commander Braylen Stramm, destroys the planetary shield and the communications station, and the battle of Malastare[1332] ends.[28]
    • Four years after their victory at the Battle of Yavin, the Alliance to Restore the Republic declares the formation of the New Republic.[59]
    • During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor[1328][28]
      • Operation: Cinder against Abednedo is over by this point.[1328]
      • New Republic Special Forces and Alphabet Squadron hunt for Shadow Wing.[1328]
      • New Republic forces led by Sergeant major Jom Barell foil an attempt by a group of Imperials to restart droid foundries left on the planet Geonosis as a remnant of the Clone Wars.[28]
      • New Republic agent Wedge Antilles conducts a scouting mission to the planet Akiva, to spy on the Imperials that had gathered for an Emergency summit where they intend to regroup and launch an attack against the New Republic. He is captured by Admiral Rae Sloane.[28]
      • The Imperial Future Council, group of high ranking Imperials including financier Arsin Crassus, General Jylia Shale, adviser Yupe Tashu, Grand Moff Valco Pandion, and Admiral Rae Sloane, holds an emergency summit on Akiva to decide the future of the Empire.[28]
      • Imperial and New Republic forces clash around a town in the mountains of the planet Naalol, with the town reduced to rubble. The devastation led Chancellor Mon Mothma to consider relinquishing the emergency powers that had been granted to the Charter of Chancellor following the reconstitution of the Galactic Senate on Chandrila.[28]
      • After learning about Wedge and the Imperial conference, the New Republic pilot Norra Wexley, her son Temmin Wexley, and the B1-series battle droid "Mister Bones" join forces with the bounty hunter Jas Emari and the former Imperial loyalty officer Sinjir Rath Velus to inspire a rebellion on Akiva. The Akiva rebellion coincides with the arrival of New Republic Special Forces soldier Jom Barell and a Republic fleet led by Commander Kyrsta Agate. With the defeat of the Imperial fleet and garrison, the Satrapy of Myrra capitulates, and Akiva becames the first Outer Rim world to join the New Republic.[28]
      • Republic forces lead a successful attack on the Imperial dockyard at Var-Shaa. Veteran of the Battle of Jeyell and flagship of Titan Squadron, the Imperial Star Destroyer Overseer, is retrofitted after winning the battle.[1333]
      • Commanded by Lindon Javes, the New Republic Vanguard Squadron is assigned to the Bormea sector aboard the MC-75 cruiser, the Temperance.[1334]
      • At Nadiri Dockyards,[1335] the Republic's Project Starhawk[1336] produces the Starhawk, a prototype vessel[1335] made from salvaged Galactic Empire starships at the debris field of Sissubo[1336] for the development of the Starhawk-class battleship.[1335]

New Republic Era (5–34 ABY)[]

Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY)[]

  • 5 ABY
  • Six months after the Battle of Endor[1337]
    • Shara Bey and Kes Dameron move to Yavin 4, planting a fragment of the Great Tree within their property.[1326]
    • The Rebel Alliance officially reorganizes into the New Republic, accomplishing its goal of restoring the Republic.[28][1338]
    • The New Republic restores the Galactic Senate in Hanna City on the planet Chandrila, its capital.[28]
    • Han Solo, with the help of imperial defector Ralsius Paldora, finds data cubes stored in a forest in Takodana, with intelligence crucial to help liberate the Wookiee homeworld of Kashyyyk. During the search, they are attacked by imperial forces, but Solo is able to escape with the data cubes with the assistance of Inferno Squad.[1309]
    • Having turned against the Empire, Inferno Squad undertakes a mission to Chinook Station on Bespin to capture former member Gideon Hask and shut down the Imperial fueling operations there.[1309]
    • Cloud City is liberated from Governor Ubrik Adelhard's Imperial remnant. Lobot, relaying messages from Lando Calrissian, forms a resistance movement with the Bespin Wing Guard on the planet that starts the fight. Soon after, the Uprising in the Anoat sector led by "the Smuggler" liberates the city, basing the Uprising's operations in the Paradise Atrium.[1331]
    • The hunt for Shadow Wing leads to an Imperial operation at Jarbanov. Concurrently, the Republic 61st Mobile Infantry participates in a campaign in the Cerberon system. (Approximate date)[1334][1339]
    • New Republic forces attack the Imperial-held Hyborean Moon, destroying a ISB's blacksite prison as well as its civilian complexes.[30]
    • Imperial Vice Admiral Perwin Gedde is captured in the planet Vorlag by a team of New Republic hunters led by Norra Wexley.[30]
    • New Republic forces attempt to liberate the Imperial-held world of Nag Ubdur. The Imperial military in the Ubdur system is cut off from the rest of the Empire, making them fight with an increased desperation. The Imperials are initially able to inflict heavy casualties on the Republic forces, including a bloody ambush at Govneh Ridge, but eventually are forced to retreat to defensive entrenchments ten kilometers away from the Ubdurian merchant city of Binjai-Tin. In the process, they raze the city and massacre its inhabitants. During the campaign, the Imperials are desperate enough to use their TIE starfighters in suicide attacks against New Republic positions.[30]
    • Siege of Arkanis. As the world falls under the New Republic, bounty hunter Mercurial Swift evacuates Brendol Hux and his son off-world, by orders of Fleet Admiral Gallius Rax.[30]
    • After a multi-week battle, the Kuat Drive Yards shipyards, orbiting the Core World planet of Kuat, fall under New Republic forces led by Fleet Admiral Gial Ackbar.[30]
    • Luke Skywalker and New Republic pilot Rynn Zenat travel to the planet Lehanis to recover Jedi Master Ky Narec's compendium. During their mission, Skywalker and Zenat encounter Arch-Mage Yuan Howzell and the Acolytes of the Beyond.[1340]
    • The Wookiees and their homeworld of Kashyyyk are liberated from Imperial territory G5-623, a breakaway faction of the Galactic Empire led by Grand Moff Lozen Tolruck, by a New Republic fleet led by Admiral Gial Ackbar and forces on the planet led by Han Solo and Norra Wexley's team.[30]
    • The Empire attacks Chandrila during the Imperial–Republic peace talks between Mon Mothma of the New Republic and Rae Sloane of the Galactic Empire held in Hanna City. Newly-freed prisoners from Ashmead's Lock on Kashyyyk who were under the influence of controller chips, involuntarily attack Mothma and other New Republic leaders. Mothma and Kyrsta Agate are injured in the attacks, while Hostis Ij, Crix Madine, and others are rumored to be dead. Masterminded by Gallius Rax, the attacks horrify Sloane, who considers the tactic too close to the tactics of the Rebel Alliance.[30]
    • The New Republic launches an attack on the Scepter, the flagship of Moff Adelhard, following his involvement in an assassination attempt on Luke Skywalker on Chandrila. Prior to the New Republic's involvement, Adelhard had confronted his Advisor Reyna Oskure after discovering her allegiance to the remains of the Empire, whom Adelhard's Imperial remnant had broken ties with. As New Republic forces begin to arrive, Oskure, with the help of the mercenary Kranor, gains the upper hand over Adelhard, and orders Kranor to execute the Grand Moff as she takes command of the Scepter. However, in Oskure's absence, Kranor allows Adelhard and his right hand man Bragh to flee while still claiming Oskure he had killed them, allowing Adelhard and his most loyal troops escape to Gallowyss via escape pod. Shortly after, Oskure requests backup from Adelhard's fleet and disbands the Iron Blockade, in which Adelhard had quarantined the Anoat sector following the Battle of Endor. After receiving a communication from Oskure informing them of such actions and requesting that they leave the Anoat sector alone, the New Republic retreats back to Chandrila at the request of Admiral Gial Ackbar.[1341]
    • Two days after the attack on the Scepter, Rynn Zenat and Luke Skywalker engage Imperial forces loyal to Adelhard, who has been exiled to the distant Anoat sector outpost of Gallowyss. While Adelhard ultimately escapes aboard a Lambda shuttle late in the battle, the New Republic learns of his survival.[1342]
    • The Acolytes of the Beyond, on orders from Adelhard, attack Chandrila in attempt to assassinate Senator Leia Organa.[1342]
    • Following his escape during the Skirmish on Gallowyss, Adelhard, having already retaken command of his Imperial remnant, returns to his former flagship, the Scepter, and recovers the Star Destroyer from the control of Reyna Oskure.[1342]
    • As part of a series of orchestrated attacks on the Empire in the lead-up to the Battle of Jakku, the Adelhard coalition attacks the Arquitens-class command cruiser of General Stansel Malgreen while it is en-route to Jakku. Upon the command cruiser entering range of Adelhard's Scepter, he has it open fire on the command cruiser with turbolasers before eventually ramming the Star Destroyer into the command cruiser, making it to explode and killing all of its crew members.[1342]
    • The Empire launches three invasions of Naboo to wipe out the New Republic presence in the system. Because Naboo had been Palpatine's homeworld, the planet had become a rallying point for Imperial sympathizers, though they are foiled by Corona Squadron of the New Republic Defense Fleet.[649]
    • General Lando Calrissian and Shriv Suurgav of Inferno Squad destroy an abandoned weapons depot in Sullust, in order to eliminate a weapons factory providing armaments to the Empire's operations in the Western Reaches.[1309]
  • In the waning months of the Galactic Civil War
    • Having been ordered by the late Emperor Palpatine himself to destroy the Empire for failing him, Gallius Rax concentrates the bulk of Imperial forces under his command to Jakku in the hopes of luring the Republic into battle there and obliterating the entire planet mid-battle, thus ensuring the death of the fragmented Empire. However, Rax also plots to retreat into the Unknown Regions with a select few Imperials whom he had deemed worthy to forge a new empire in the shadows.[982]
  • Eleven months after the Battle of Endor
    • The New Republic engages in border skirmishes with the New Separatist Union.[1327]
    • New Republic General Hera Syndulla leads Alphabet Squadron in pursuit of the 204th Imperial Fighter Wing after spotting the Imperials in the Ciaox Verith system.[1327]
    • General Syndulla leads Alphabet Squadron on a mission to Chadawa, where they battle Imperial loyalist forces enforcing Operation: Cinder, including the 204th, and the Chadawan government. Before the battle, Imperial loyalists had inflicted Operation: Cinder upon Dybbron III and Kortatka.[1327]
  • By this point, the 204th Imperial Fighter Wing had attacked Fedovoi End after its ruling Yomo Council refused to follow Grand Admiral Rae Sloane's orders.[1327]
    • General Ria reports to New Republic High Command of the Repulic's Xagobah campaign against the local Imperial-Royalist coalition.[1327]
  • The newly founded Confederacy of Corporate Systems and the New Separatist Union adds to New Republic Chancellor Mon Mothma's worries as the Republic prepares to move its seat of power from Chandrila to the agriworld Nakadia.[982]
  • By this point, Brin Izisca had become a leader of the Church of the Force, and made holographic recordings of his teachings, including himself reading from the Journal of the Whills.[982]
  • The Sovereign Latitudes of Maracavanya's Star Dreadnought, the Liberty's Misrule, destroys three Imperial II-class Star Destroyers.[982]
  • New Republic Senator Tolwar Wartol is arrested for attempting to assassinate Mon Mothma by planting a bomb in her office at the Chandrila Senate house. The attempt fails as Mothma had left to buy a baby gift for Leia Organa, and her advisor Auxi Kray Korbin dies instead.[982]
  • Battle of Jakku. One year and four days after the Battle of Endor, New Republic forces and the bulk of the Imperial Starfleet engage on Jakku, with the Republic emerging victorious.[649]
    • Imperial leader Brendol Hux offers local orphans a chance to leave the suffering of Jakku by recruiting them as child soldiers under the leadership of his son, Armitage.[982] Infinitely loyal, the soldiers included Archex.[1343] Gallius Rax is killed by Rae Sloane while attempting to obliterate Jakku in the goal of eliminating all Imperial forces.[982]
  • The Galactic Concordance. The New Republic and the Galactic Empire cease hostilities, and both powers begin a process of disarmament.[55] The remaining forces of the Empire led by Grand Admiral Rae Sloane, amongst them Brendol Hux and his rescued orphans, adopt Rax's scheme and retreat to the Unknown Regions, rendezvousing with the fallen Emperor's personal Super Star Destroyer, the Eclipse.[982]

Peace (5–28 ABY)[]

"As you get older, you look at history, and you realize that it's all inevitable. The fall of the Jedi. The rise of the Empire. It repeats again, and again, and again."
"Then isn't it our turn, now? Won't our alliance with Thrawn finally bring us into power?"
"That sort of power is fleeting. What I seek is the beginning, so I may finally bring this cycle to an end."
―Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati[11]
  • 5 ABY
    • The taming of the Unknown (5 ABY–15 ABY): The Imperial remnant that fled to the Unknown Regions is met by secret reinforcements in uncharted space. There, the remnant of the Empire grows in power, eventually becoming the First Order, and Imperial-era leaders, such as Grand Admiral Rae Sloane, General Brendol Hux, and Allegiant General Enric Pryde make way for the rise of Snoke, heir apparent to the fallen Emperor. Some come to realize that their new leader was himself subservient to an unseen force.[50]
    • The Ryloth Insurgency ends.[30]
    • Ben Solo is born to Leia Organa and Han Solo.[982] By this point,[1330] Leia Organa had concluded her year-long training with Luke Skywalker for she witnessed visions of the future, seeing where she would best serve the galaxy.[50]
    • Luke Skywalker begins searching the galaxy for lost lore of the Force.[1344]
    • After the Galactic Civil War, the Cosmic Force becomes dormant and is seemingly quieted to those who could sense its presence. (Approximate date)[55]
  • Sometime after 5 ABY
    • An Imperial remnant led by Grand Moff Randd has fled to the Queluhan Nebula in the Unknown Regions.[649]
    • Tamara Ryvora is born on the planet Kuat to a racer. Her father's career would later inspire her to become a racer herself.[1345]
    • Team Fireball, a racing team, is found by Jarek Yeager.[1345]
  • 6 ABY
    • Paige Tico is born[1346] on the Hays Minor mining colony to Hue and Thanya Tico.[1347]
    • Phasma is born on Parnassos.[1348]
    • Siv is born.[1348]
    • Simero Quonit is born.[1349]
    • Terex travels to Kaddak.[1350]
    • Luke Skywalker uncovers Jocasta Nu's cache.[21]
    • Information concerning the Pyke Syndicate is pulled from the Imperial-class Star Destroyer Deliberator close to the Kessel system.[873]
    • Fenril Crisis.[1351]
      • Pirates raid New Republic trading vessels at the Rimma Trade Route, near the planet Sullust. Several starships are destroyed and dozens of traders are killed.[1352]
      • A Nagai pirate crash-lands on an unknown planet at the edge of the Fenril sector and is pursued by Rynn Zenat and Luke Skywalker after provoking the death of New Republic pilot Sandrin. Rynn and Luke disarm the pirate, who informs Luke about the lost Crown of Verity, before detonating a bomb and killing himself.[1353]
      • A trade summit is held and the New Republic is going to attend, until a meeting between New Republic Senator Leia Organa, Chancellor Mon Mothma, and the Pirrosi delegation led by Prime Minister Kezrin Almovar turns sour. Prime Minister Almovar claims the New Republic is not welcome at the trade summit because they are acting like a desperate bully, and because they can't even defend their own supply shipments from pirate attacks. Shortly after, the New Republic is formally expelled from the trade summit. In a holo-transmission, Almovar confirms that the Fenril sector will be pulling out of all trade with the New Republic and will be responding to any trespassers into the sector with force.[1353]
      • At the Alshuey Town Bar on the planet Guat'a, Beilert Valance is kicked out by members of the Zantarrk gang, who later confront him outside the bar. Han Solo steps in to stop the gang from killing him, which begins a shootout. After causing a large explosion, the two New Republic agents escape back to the Millennium Falcon and away from the gang.[1353]
      • While entering the Fenril sector, the CR90 corvette Nechrim's Wake and other vessels are attacked by multiple Zantarrk Gang starships, and the trading vessel is forced to crash land on the planet Loradil, where its crew is attacked by Confederacy of Independent Systems battle droids.[1353]
      • Mission to Gadrilam.[1354]
      • The Nagai Garlev crashes onto Cloud City on the planet Bespin, where he demands to speak to his old comrades Lando Calrissian and Han Solo. Joined by Beilert Valance, Solo arrives on Bespin and meet with Calrissian, but, by that point, a mysterious assassin, secretly the Anzati Reyna Oskure, has already killed Garlev. The assassin then manages to escape aboard a new model of cloud car.[1355]
      • A funeral is held for Garlev at Cloud City by Han Solo, Lando Calrissian and Beilert Valance.[1355]
      • Seeking to bring the Fenril sector planet of Kaltrais, once a proud member world of the Galactic Republic, into the New Republic, Organa contacts her childhood friend, the planet's President Tusvein Shoirin. But after the offer is strangely denied and an in-person meeting arranged, she suspects and travels to the planet with Kith Alaytia, against the wills of Mon Mothma and Luke Skywalker. After a quick meeting with Shoirin confirms that he is no longer truly in control, Organa and Alaytia are captured by occupying Zantarrk Gang stormtroopers. They manage to escape imprisonment and free Shoirin as the Millennium Falcon arrives with Han Solo, Luke Skywalker, Rynn Zenat, and Beilert Valance to rescue them. Over Kaltrais, the Falcon is attacked by a Fenril Consortium's fleet before Shoirin gives his life shutting down the planet's defense systems and causing the fleet to retreat. After the battle, Reyna Oskure reveals to the New Republic that she is part of the Consortium.[1356]
      • Luke Skywalker, Han Solo, Beilert Valance, and Rynn Zenat are send by Mon Mothma to Loradil to rescue the crew of New Republic merchant corvette Nechrim's Wake, who are under attack by a group of surviving Confederacy of Independent Systems battle droids based in a Providence-class Carrier. The New Republic agents fight through the crashed carrier, eventually meeting droid resistance. In order to fight their way out of the carrier, the three men find and use Phase II clone trooper armor for the ensuing battle, while Zenat escapes to the downed Republic corvette. There, she meets captain Gauvis and Finch from its crew, who introduce her to Nagai rebellion member Marntiv, the reason why the ship was targeted by the Zantarrk Gang. After a battle with countless battle droids and several Armored Assault Tanks, they manage to escape aboard the Millennium Falcon with the merchant crew members and Marntiv.[1357][1358]
      • The Nagai rebellion stages an insurrection following years of abuse and slavery. As Nagai slaves are being moved and used by the Zantarrk Gang and the Fenril Consortium, the followers of Garlev indentured on the Fenril sector world of Kaltrais rise up against their oppressors, starting a violent revolt. This insurrection quickly grows under the leadership of Jesrit, and New Republic agents led by Luke Skywalker soon arrive to help after rescuing Marntiv on Loradil. Fighting on the ground, the New Republic aided Nagai make quick progress, with Republic special agent Bastion having been placed on Kaltrais earlier by Leia Organa. They eventually make it to Pirrosi Prime Minister Almovar's chamber, talking her down from her plans as the insurrection continues. Vowing to make things right, Almovar calls her fleet away from the New Republic, as the New Republic's agents accompany the newly-freed Nagai to a hangar. There they steal many ships as Luke Skywalker covers for their departure before he is picked up in the Millennium Falcon. Using the stolen ships, the Nagai rebellion is now bound for their homeworld of Nagi.[1358]
      • The freed Nagai link up with the rest of their freed comrades revolting against the Fenril Consortium with the goal of retaking their ancestral planet. As the battle rages, the Millennium Falcon is intercepted by pirate forces in orbit and crashed into the battle on the surface, and its occupants are united with the Nagai rebels. Skywalker, Zenat, and Jesrit are attacked while in transit to get medical attention for the dying Zenat, resulting in Jesrit and Zenat being captured and brought to Oskure's throne in the Nagai Royal Palace. The Anzati is distracted by Solo's party's infiltration, including Beilert Valance and Agent Bastion. Skywalker, left in the wastes of Nagi, runs until fainting from exhaustion, but is awoken by Tuula, daughter of Garlev. Zantarrk leader Gallana Venk is sent to destroy Solo's group, but is killed in the process by Beilert Valance. After tracking Oskure's location, Bastion is killed, but the information she gains leads Solo and Valance to Oskure, who is trying to escape the planet as her pirate forces blockade the world in orbit.[1359]
      • In response to an earlier call for aid from Solo, Leia Organa sends Kith Alaytia and a New Republic task force to Nagi to aid the Nagai in their battle. Solo, Valance, Skywalker, and Tuula arrive just as Oskure's shuttle is being loaded, and Skywalker holds her still while he placed the Crown of Verity on her head. She reveals that her entire fleet is rigged to self-destruct, which will allow her to take the entire New Republic fleet and everyone on the surface with it.[1359]
  • 7 ABY
    • Terex obtains the Carrion Spike.[1350]
    • The Vorantis, a ship owned by the pilot Brantis Mo Fresk, beat the starship Brightfox in the Karee Blockade Clutch.[29]
    • Han Solo and Lando Calrissian search for the Phylanx Redux Transmitter, a weapon system capable of transmitting a virus that causes droids to attack and kill organics. They hope to prevent its creator, Pau'an gangster Fyzen Gor, from unleashing a massacre on Cloud City.[29]
      • Mission to Substation Grimdock.[29]
      • The New Republic Defense Fleet blockades the prison moon Substation Grimdock, after Imperial Sergeant Magernon grants amnesty to many of the prisoners and starships of many pirate organizations arrive to collect the prisoners. During the fight, Fyzen Gor escapes aboard the pirate frigate Radium Destrobar. Following the loss of their two largest warships, the pirates surrender.[29]
      • Han Solo and Lando Calrissian track the transmitter to the Mesulan Remnants Belt, where they fight Fyzen Gor and his Original Dozen, helped by L3-37's Elthree Assault Team. Gor is killed by Solo.[29]
  • 8 ABY
    • Poe Dameron begins to learn to fly starships from his mother, Shara Bey.[1360]
  • 9 ABY[1361]
    • Gideon's Imperial remnant issues a bounty to multiple hunters on "the Child"—a Force-sensitive member of Yoda's species named Grogu. Multiple parties clash in the ensuing hunt for Grogu, with the Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin emerging as the victor after undertaking a mission to Arvala-7.[1362]
    • Despite giving the Child to his Imperial clients, Din Djarin would not let go, and instead mounts a rescue.[1363]
    • A village on the planet Sorgan hires Din Djarin and Carasynthia Dune to protect them from Klatooinian raiders that had been attacking and raiding them. After basic combat training for the villagers and building defenses around the village, in the resulting skirmish the Klatooinian tribe is repelled and their AT-ST Raider destroyed.[1364]
    • While on Tatooine, Din Djarin is hired by bounty hunter Toro Calican to assist him in the capture of renegade assassin Fennec Shand. After a hunt, Calican shoots Shand in the stomach, and she is left for dead. Calican learns about the bounty on Grogu, and tries to capture him, but is killed by Djarin[1312]. The following night, Shand is saved by Boba Fett.
    • In the Bothan-Five incident, a crew hired by Ranzar Malk in Roost space station, led by mercenary Migs Mayfeld, and including Din Djarin, infiltrates the New Republic Correctional Transport Bothan-5 in order to liberate prisoner Qin. As the crew reaches the holding cell, they betray Djarin and he is forced to lock the other mercenaries in a cell before escaping with the prisoner. Djarin returned Qin to the Roost space station and left behind a New Republic tracking device, allowing the New Republic to destroy the station.[1365]
    • Nevarro is liberated from the Imperial remnant of Moff Gideon by Din Djarin and his allies, including Greef Karga, Cara Dune, Kuiil and IG-11. The later sacrifices himself via self-destruction in order to kill a platoon of stormtroopers to prevent Grogu from being captured.[1068]
    • During a mission to Tatooine, Din Djarin brokes an alliance between the citizens of Mos Pelgo and a tribe of Tusken Raiders, and together they take down a leviathan krayt dragon that had been terrorizing their region of the planet.[1366]
    • Djarin is tasked by Peli Motto with delivering the Querm Rybet "Frog Lady" to her husband on Trask, in exchange for the location of a group of Mandalorians. As a result, he meets Bo-Katan Kryze's unit.[1367]
    • Din Djarin joins Bo-Katan Kryze's group of Mandalorians in a mission to steal weapons from Moff Gideon's Imperial remnant. Before parting ways, Kryze instructs Djarin to find her friend Ahsoka Tano on Corvus.[1368]
    • Greef Karga, now Magistrate of Nevarro, recruits Din Djarin and Cara Dune into attacking Moff Gideon's Nevarro Imperial base, with the objective of eliminating the Imperial presence on the planet. After fighting their way into the base, they discover cloning cylinders containing remnants of Doctor Penn Pershing's failed experiments, indicating that Grogu was sought for his midi-chlorians. The base is destroyd and Gideon's Imperial remnant is driven from Nevarro.[1369]
    • Djarin travels to Corvus along with Grogu, meeting Ahsoka Tano.[1370]
      • They liberate the city Calodan together from the control of Elsbeth's regime, fighting mercenaries and HK-87 assassin droids. Tano defeats the city's despot Morgan Elsbeth in a duel and interrogates her for the whereabouts of Grand Admiral Thrawn.[1370]
      • Tano sees that she could not train Grogu, as Djarin had formed a paternal bond with the child, and in turn suggests that Djarin take Grogu to Tython, where the child could find his path in the Force.[1370]
    • Grogu, while trying to comunicate with other Jedi through the seeing stone, located at the ancient ruins of the Force-henge on the planet Tython, is captured by Moff Gideon's dark troopers and taken to Gideon's light cruiser. Din Djarin, Boba Fett and Fennec Shand fight Imperial forces but are unable to rescue Grogu, and in the fight the Razor Crest is destroyed.[1371]
    • Din Djarin and his allies, Cara Dune, Migs Mayfeld, Boba Fett, and Fennec Shand undertake a Mission against Imperial remnants on the planet Morak. Djarin and Mayfeld infiltrate the Morak Imperial refinery posing as Juggernaut Pilots to retrieve information on the whereabouts of Moff Gideon's light cruiser. During their escape, Mayfeld fires on a shipment of rhydonium, causing a chain reaction that heavily damages the refinery.[1372]
    • Din Djarin and his allies, along with Nite Owls Bo-Katan Kryze, Koska Reeves and Axe Woves mounts a successful rescue of Grogu from Moff Gideon's cruiser. They are able to pilot a stolen shuttle through the launch tube and crash-land in the cruiser, allowing the team to board it. Din Djarin defeats Gideon in a duel, and a Dark Trooper platoon called by Gideon is destroyed by Luke Skywalker, who sensed Grogu through Tython's seeing stone.[1373]
      • Djarin takes the Darksaber while Gideon is taken into New Republic custody, though he is broken out en route to trial.[1374]
      • As Bo-Katan Kryze returned to her forces without the Darksaber, her Mandalorians abandon her and become privateers under Axe Woves.[1374]
      • The Jedi Luke Skywalker beckons Grogu to train as a Jedi with him. Removing his Mandalorian helmet, Djarin gives his blessing to Grogu before letting the latter go.[1373]
    • By this time, Luke Skywalker is building a Jedi Temple on the planet Ossus.[1375]
    • Boba Fett and Fennec Shand attack Jabba's Palace. Fett kills Bib Fortuna and takes his place as master of the palace.[1373]
    • Boba Fett assumes the title of Daimyo after taking control of the throne of Jabba from Bib Fortuna. He laids claim to Jabba's possessions, including the criminal empire that Jabba built on Tatooine.[1376]
    • Boba Fett and Fennec Shand are ambushed outside Sanctuary, a cantina and casino in the city of Mos Espa, by a group of assassins belonging to the Order of the Night Wind. They are helped by two Gamorrean Warriors, and defeat the assassins, Fennec captures one of them for interrogation.[1377]
    • A Hutt brother and sister, twin cousins of Jabba, send the Wookiee bounty hunter Krrsantan to assassinate the Daimyo. However, Krrsantan fails to kill Boba Fett and is captured. Defeated, the twins apologize to Fett and give him a rancor.[1378]
    • Fett recruits into his gotra the Mods, a street gang of cyborgs operating within the Worker's District in Mos Espa. The gang had resorted to stealing from the water monger Lortha Peel since they were unable to find work in order to pay for the high price of water. After learning of their situation, Fett gives them an offer to work for him.[1378]
    • Boba Fett and the Mods chase Mayor Mok Shaiz's majordomo through the streets of Mos Espa. After capturing him, he informed Fett that Shaiz was working with the Pyke Syndicate.[1378]
    • Din Djarin hunts the Klatooinian Kaba Baiz to his meat packing plant on Glavis Ringworld. He eliminates Baiz and five other Klatooinians and convinces the other workers to let him walk out of the plant unharmed.[1379]
    • At the Mandalorian covert on Glavis Ringworld, Paz Vizsla, member of House Vizsla, challenges Djarin for a duel so he could regain the Darksaber back to his Clan. The duel is stopped by the Armorer, who exiles Djarin after learning he had removed his helmet.[1379]
    • The Marshal of Freetown Cobb Vanth and his deputy Scott face Cad Bane, a bounty hunter under the employment of the Pyke Syndicate, in a shoot-out in the outskirts of the town. Cobb Vanth is wounded and Scott is killed, and Cad Bane warns the citizens of Freetown not to interfere in the syndicate's takeover of Tatooine.[1375]
    • After a brief time training with Luke Skywalker in his Temple, Grogu decides to return to Din Djarin. They reunite in Mos Espa after R2-D2 transports Grogu in Luke's X-Wing from Tython to Tatooine.[1380]
    • A gang war between Daimyo Boba Fett's Fett gotra and the Pyke Syndicate for the control of Tatooine.[1380]
      • The Pyke Syndicate destroys Garsa Fwip's Sanctuary by planting a bomb within a camtono left inside the cantina. Everyone inside the Sanctuary, including Garsa Fwip and her servers, are killed. Although Mayor Mok Shaiz approved of the Pykes operating in Mos Espa to combat Boba Fett and his gotra, he did not approve of the bombing. The incident marks the beginning of open warfare between the Fett Gotra and Pykes.[1375]
      • The Fett gotra, helped by the people of Freetown and Din Djarin and Grogu, battles the Pyke Syndicate, allied with the Aqualish, Strassi and Klatooinian crime families, in Mos Espa for the control of the planet. After a Fett gotra victory, the Pyke Syndicate falls back from Mos Espa, the city is partially destroyed, and Cad Bane is killed by Boba Fett.[1380]
      • Fennec Shand assassinates the leadership of the Pykes and their allies at their Desert Survey Office in the city of Mos Eisley. With their deaths, the Fett gotra defeats the Pyke Syndicate presence on the world and emerges as its leading criminal syndicate.[1380]
  • c. 9 ABY
    • During a Children of the Watch induction ceremony outside a Mandalorian covert, a Lake monster attacks members of the Tribe. The Mandalorians have difficulty dealing with the beast until the arrival of Din Djarin, who launches proton torpedoes from his N-1 starfighter, killing the beast. Djarin had found proof that the Living Waters of Mandalore could still exist and had arrived to ask "the Armorer" for permission to launch a quest to redeem himself in the eyes of the Children of the Watch.[1381]
    • In Nevarro City, Greef Karga shoots Vane's blaster and kills four pirates belonging to Gorian Shard's pirate gang who wanted to drink inside the Nevarro school, with the assistance of Din Djarin.[1381]
    • While in orbit above Nevarro, Djarin and Grogu are attacked by pirate starfighters commanded by Vane, who sought to avenge the deaths of his brothers. After a chase through asteroid fields, and evading Gorian Shard's Corsair, Djarin manages to escape, destroying five of the pirate starfighters in the process.[1381]
    • With Bo-Katan Kryze's help, Din Djarin bathes in the Living Waters of Mandalore in order to redeem his position in the Children of the Watch, in the process discovering that Mandalore is still habitable. While also submerged in the Living Waters, Bo-Katan witnesses a live Mythosaur.[1382]
    • A large force of TIE bombers, send by Gideon's Imperial remnant, destroy the castle of Bo-Katan Kryze on the planet Kalevala, homeworld of House Kryze in the Mandalore system. TIE interceptors attack Bo-Katan Kryze's Gauntlet starfighter and Din Djarin's N-1 starfighter, who are unable to stop the bombing.[1382]
    • Doctor Penn Pershing, former Imperial scientist and Amnesty Officer, joins fellow officer Elia Kane into retrieving a mobile lab station from a decommissioned Imperial-class Star Destroyer, hoping to use it to continue his cloning research. However, New Republic soldiers arrest Pershing, and Elia Kane erases his memory to prevent him from revealing the secrets of Moff Gideon's cloning project to the wider galaxy.[1382]
    • After Ragnar Vizsla, a Mandalorian Foundling, is taken from the Mandalorian covert by a canyon raptor to its nest, he is rescued by a war party led by Bo-Katan, including Din Djarin and Ragnar's father, Paz Vizsla.[1383]
    • Mandalorians from The Tribe, led by Bo-Katan Kryze, and including Din Djarin, Paz Vizsla, and the Armorer, liberate Nevarro from the pirates of Gorian Shard,[1384] who had captured the the planet at the behest of Moff Gideon. Bo-Katan's Gauntlet starfighter drops the Mandalorian warriors into the city, who fight in the streets against the pirates. Meanwhile, Bo-Katan's Gauntlet and Din Djarin's N-1 starfighter destroy Gorian Shard's Corsair, killing him and his crew.[1374]
    • Bo-Katan Kryze is accepted into the Children of the Watch, and the Armorer tasks Kryze with reuniting all Mandalorians.[1384]
    • After the son of a Mon Calamari viceroy runs away with his Quarren lover Shuggoth aboard her starship, his mother hires a group of Mandalorian privateers led by Axe Woves to retrieve him and bring him home.[1374]
    • Din Djarin and Bo-Katan Kryze travel to the planet Plazir-15 in an attempt to recruit the Mandalorian mercenary forces following Axe Woves, who were stationed on the planet. There they investigate the mysterious malfunctioning of Plazir-15's droids at the behest of the planetary goverment, and capture rogue Head of Security Commissioner Helgait, who was behind the malfunctioning of the droids.[1374]
    • Kryze returns to Axe Woves' group of Mandalorians with the Darksaber in hand, regaining their allegiance and her Mandalorian fleet.[1374]
    • The Shadow Council, among which include Brendol Hux and Gideon, anticipates Gilad Pellaeon's promise of the return of Grand Admiral Thrawn.[1385]
    • Together with the Children of the Watch, the Mandalorian resistance led by Bo-Katan Kryze lands on the planet Mandalore. On the surface they find survivors of the Great Purge of Mandalore, and join forces to retake Mandalore from Moff Gideon' Imperial remnant, who continued to control the planet with the secret support of the Imperial warlords on the Shadow Council after the fall of the Empire. The Mandalorians defeat Gideon's forces, including members of the Praetorian Guard. Gideon and his Force-sensitive clones are killed, destroying his Imperial remnant. After the battle, Din Djarin adopts Din Grogu as his son and is tasked with taking him on his journeys, Mandalore is resettled by the Mandalorians who begin to rebuild the planet, and the Great Forge is relit.[1385]
  • c. 9 ABY (continued)
    • Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn.[12]
      • Former Jedi Knight Baylan Skoll and his apprentice Shin Hati board and attack the New Republic Defender-class cruiser Vesper to rescue Morgan Elsbeth. They kill almost all the New Republic forces, including the captain of the ship Hayle, and after retrieving Elzbeth the cruiser is destroyed.[12]
      • Ahsoka Tano travels to a Nightsister temple on the planet Arcana to retrieve a map that leads to the missing Grand Admiral Thrawn. However, Tano is ambushed by HK-87 assassin droids sent by Morgan Elsbeth, who self-destruct after Tano escapes with the map and destroys the stronghold.[12]
      • Governor Ryder Azadi of Lothal, accompanied by Lothal Senator Jai Kell, holds a ceremony in Capital City to celebrate the Liberation of Lothal and also to honor the Spectres with a mural.[12]
      • On Lothal, Ahsoka Tano and Sabine Wren duel Shin Hati, who attempts to steal the map to the missing Grand Admiral Thrawn for Morgan Elsbeth. Ultimately, Hati successfully escapes with the map after stabbing Wren in the stomach with her lightsaber.[12]
      • The former Inquisitor Marrok and Shin Hati travel to the Santhe Shipyards on the planet Corellia to retrieve the final hyperdrive engine for the Eye of Sion, an intergalactic transport, while Ahsoka Tano and Hera Syndulla try to stop them. Ahsoka duels Marrok and Hera Syndulla pursue the Transport CT-O5 escaping with the engine. Although they escape, Syndulla places a tracking device on the hyperdrive engine. Santhe Shipyards' Regional Supervisor Myn Weaver is arrested for plotting with the Imperial Remnants.[10]
      • Ahsoka Tano and Sabine Wren discover the Eye of Sion in the Denab system. At Morgan Elsbeth's command, Shin Hati and Marrok lead a starfighter squadron against Tano and Wren, attempting to destroy the T-6 1974 shuttle carrying them. During the dogfight, Tano's droid Huyang scanns the Eye of Sion which is a large hyperspace transport ring, but her T-6 shuttle is damaged in the process. Hati's squadron pursue the Jedi to the planet Seatos, and ultimately the Jedi escape from Hati and Marrok, whose squadmates are killed during the battle.[1386]
      • On Seatos, Sabine Wren duels Shin Hati while Ahsoka Tano duels Marrok. After killing Marrok, Tano travels to a henge used for mapping the other galaxy, where she faces Baylan Skoll in a duel. After temporarily disabling the map, Skoll knocks her off the edge of a cliff, and she enters the World Between Worlds. After Hati disappears, Wren finds Skoll at the henge and threatens to destroy the map. Knowing she wants to find Ezra, Skoll calls her bluff, convincing her to allow him to reactivate the map so that she can go with them to find Bridger.[1387]
      • Elsbeth's Eye of Sion is completed over Seatos. The Dark Jedi capture the pursuing Sabine Wren and together they depart for the galaxy of Thrawn's exile.[11]
      • New Republic General Hera Syndulla defies orders to help Tano and Wren in their pursuit on Seatos, and is recalled for trial by senators such as Hamato Xiono.[1388]
      • Wren, Tano, and Ezra Bridger reunite on Peridea and kill Morgan Elsbeth.[1389]
      • The Dathomiri Great Mothers help Thrawn's forces with their return to the known galaxy, arriving at Dathomir.[1389]
      • Baylan Skoll leaves Hati, who leads a band of nomads, to attend to the mysteries of the Force on Peridea.[1389]
      • While Wren, Tano, and Huyang also remain on Peridea, Ezra Bridger returns to the New Republic.[1389]
    • A gang of pirates led by Captain Silvo raid a New Republic bulk Cargo freighter, using a much larger pirate frigate the pirate crew intercepts the freighter, disable and board it. After fighting and defeating the crew of merchants, the pirates find the freighter's vault empty. Pirate Brutus leads a mutiny against Silvo, blaming him for the futile lost of some of their members.[1390]
    • Escape from Port Borgo.[1390]
    • Mission to the Observatory Moon.[1391]
    • Mission to Skull Ridge Mountain.[1392]
    • Trial of Silvo.[1393]
    • Invasion of At Attin.[1394]
  • 10 ABY
    • CS-9147 is born[1395] in the Otomok system.[50]
    • HF-3311 is born[1396] on Gannaria.[50]
    • Shara Bey dies of bloodburn.[21]
  • 11 ABY
    • Rose Tico is born.[1397] in the mining colony of Hays Minor to Hue and Thanya Tico.[1347]
    • Finn is born.[21]
    • Ana Tolla is born.[1398]
    • TX-8080 is born on the planet Hevurion.[1399]
  • 12 ABY
    • Korr Sella is born to Sondiv Sella and a fellow New Republic politician.[643]
    • Tallissan Lintra is born.[22]
  • 13 ABY
    • A group of Spice Runners of Kijimi, including the Klatooinian Vigilch, seek refuge from New Republic starships on the planet Yungbrii, and become cornered in the Trune family farm. The Spice Runners use the farm's residents as living shields, and eventually escape aboard a stolen vessel. The gunfight with the New Republic costs lives on both sides, and results in the deaths of the family of Sela Trune.[1400]
    • ST-I4191 is born.[1401]
    • Kadara Calrissian is born to Landonis Balthazar Calrissian.[21]
    • Kaydel Ko Connix is born[1402] on the planet Dulathia.[22]
  • 14 ABY
    • Naka Iit begins a career as a scavenger on the planet Jakku.[811]
    • Devi is born.[1317]
    • Strunk is born.[1317]
    • Kazuda Xiono is born on Hosnian Prime to New Republic Senator Hamato Xiono.[1403]
    • Finn is abducted by the First Order at the age of three from his family.[1404]
    • ST-A1215 is born[1405] on Exegol.[1406]
  • 15 ABY
    • Luke Skywalker restores the Jedi Order.[1407]
    • Ben Solo begins training with Jedi Master Luke Skywalker.[59]
    • Kadara Calrissian is abducted by the First Order.[21]
    • Rey is born from Dathan and Miramir on Hyperkarn.[21]
    • Julen Rakab is born into a farming community.(Approximate date)[1408]
    • Karr Nuq Sin is born to Tomar and Looway Nuq Sin on the planet Merokia.(Approximate date)[1409]
  • 16 ABY
    • Luke Skywalker teaches his new padawans in the ways of the Force.[21]
    • Izal Garsea is born[1410] to the bounty hunter Ixel Garsea aboard her freighter, the Meridian.[1411]
    • Aftab Ackbar is born [1412] to Gial Ackbar on Mon Cala.(Approximate date)[1413]
  • 17 ABY
    • NK-Witell-class freighter is introduced.[1317]
  • 18 ABY
    • Ransolm Casterfo experiences as a member of the Riosa's planetary security force make him come to believe that improving Riosa's fortunes lay in embarking in a political career, as Riosa needs better political and economic management to rebuild after the damage done by the Empire, and leaves the security force.[21]
    • Torra Doza is born[1414] to Venisa and Imanuel Doza.[1415]
    • Jac Lodain is born.[1416]
    • A cell of the smuggler gang known as the Spice Runners of Kijimi undertakes a heist on Kellgar Seven. The group, led by Vigilch, succeedes and escapes to the moon Yavin 4. However, the cell's members discover that their pilot, Beke Mon'z, is betraying them to rival syndicates, while actually he is a spy for the New Republic Security Bureau officer Sela Trune. On Yavin 4, Vigilch kills Mon'z, leaving the Spice Runners stranded, while Trune leads an investigation on the moon following the death of her operative. The group is assisted by Poe Dameron, a resident of Yavin 4 who wishes to escape the moon, who pilots their XS stock light freighter Ragged Claw offworld.[1400]
    • Poe Dameron joins the Spice Runners of Kijimi,[21] developing a close relationship with Zorii Bliss, the daughter of the Spice Runners' leader Zeva Bliss.[1400]
    • A skirmish is fought between the Spice Runners of Kijimi and the rival Zualjinn Syndicate on the planet Quintil. After Tomasso, the leader of a smaller Spice Runner cell, kills the Zualjinn high commander while meeting with the syndicate under the guise of a diplomatic mission, he is left stranded on Quintil, with the Zualjinn searching for him. The remaining members of the cell, led by Vigilch, embark on a mission to save Tomasso, who is located by Zorii Bliss and the new recruit Poe Dameron. The Zualjinn locate the remaining Spice Runners, pinning them down in a blaster fight. Dameron attempts to trick the Zualjinn leader into thinking he is betraying the Spice Runners as a distraction, but Tomasso is caught sneaking onto their starship, and the Spice Runner cell is captured and imprisoned. However, the smugglers are freed by a group of Kyuzo associates of Tomasso, led by Zatticha. The Kyuzo aide the Spice Runners in reaching their vessel and escaping the planet, though the smugglers are pursued by three Zualjinn ships. With Dameron piloting, the Spice Runners manage to escape the Zualjinn by hyperspace skipping, crash-landing on the planet Sorgan. Following Dameron's feat, the Spice Runner cell officially recognizes him as a member.[1400]
    • After escaping the Pykes, Ledesmar, a mercenary and former slave of the Pyke Syndicate, steals a Moraysian cruiser and its complement of droids, and strucks out alone, at some point obtaining the helmet of Zeva Bliss. In order to both eliminate Ledesmar as a potential threat and retrieve the helmet, a cell of the Spice Runners led by Vigilch attacks the cruiser, with Poe Dameron's piloting defeating Ledesmar's automated drones and allowing them to board. Aboard, the EV-series droid EV-6B6, unwillingly serving the mercenary, leads Zorii Bliss and Poe Dameron into a trap. While Ledesmar kills Vigilch, Bliss manages to kill the mercenary. However, Sela Trune intends to use the Spice Runners' mission as a trap, having received word of the mission from Tomasso, who has become an informant for the New Republic. Five New Republic starships exit hyperspace near the Moraysian cruiser, and Trune boards the cruiser with a team of officers, cornering Bliss, Dameron, and the freed EV-6B6 as they try to escape. While Bliss and the droid escape on a BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighter, Dameron incapacitates Trune, fleeing the cruiser in the Ragged Claw, but not before making sure that Trune's officers rescue her. Trune takes the Spice Runner Marinda Gan prisoner.[1400]
    • The smuggler Alfris Sotin proposes a deal to the Spice Runners of Kijimi, and they send Zorii Bliss and Poe Dameron to Ankot Station to meet him. However, Sotin betrays them to the Guavian Death Gang, and the Spice Runners find themselves under attack by Guavian soldiers. Bliss and Dameron manage to escape, also freeing several slaves Sotin had aboard his freighter, the Vondel.[1400]
  • 19 ABY
    • The Spice Runners of Kijimi send Zorii Bliss and Poe Dameron to the planet Guat'a to steal the star maps known as the Letters of Where and When, from the warlord Smaatku. They are pursued by Smaatku and his guards, who are killed when Tomasso hits them with the blaster cannons of the freighter Vondel. Following the heist, the Osako pirates pursue the Spice Runners through the nearby Torch Nebula, having been approached by Kes Dameron, Poe's father, to track down his son.[1400]
    • Zeva Bliss, leader of the Spice Runners of Kijimi, invites numerous criminal allies and enemies to Kijimi under the guise of making alliances, but intending to instead execute the criminals present, lifting the Spice Runners up in the galactic underworld. While Bliss speaks to her guests, her daughter Zorii, alongside Dameron and the droid EV-6B6, are sent to activate the trap that will leave the criminals prisoner to the Spice Runners. While Dameron is not initially informed of the summit's true purpose, he eventually realizes what Bliss plans to do, and refuses to follow her orders. He and EV-6B6 abandon working for the Spice Runners, helping the criminals escape their execution. At the same time, rogue New Republic officer Sela Trune visits Kijimi intent on killing Zeva Bliss, but is struck down and fatally wounded by the Spice Runner leader. After the criminals are freed, some, including Tarand Crowe, remain behind to fight against the Spice Runners. However, EV-6B6 is destroyed by the guard Gezlar, who almost succeeds in killing Dameron. After Trune's defeat, Dameron attacks Zeva Bliss. Bliss overpowers Dameron, but is stopped from killing him by Zorii. Zorii suggests that she and Dameron defeat Zeva and take control of the Spice Runners, but Dameron refuses to continue living a criminal life, leading his former partner to order him to run. Dameron finds assistance from Crowe, who directs him to a contact of his on Kijimi.[21][1400]
    • During his attempt to rebuild the Jedi Order, Luke Skywalker travels with his Padawan Ben Solo and the explorer Lor San Tekka to the planet Elphrona, where they hope to find Jedi artifacts in the planet's Jedi outpost. On route to Elphrona, Snoke takes the opportunity to sow seeds of doubt in Solo about the Jedi Order, while inside the outpost, the Jedi and Tekka encounter the Knights of Ren, who also wish to claim the artifacts inside the outpost.[1417]
    • Phasma and her older brother Keldo of the desolate Unknown Regions planet of Parnassos reside with their family directly around the Nautilus, the clan's ancestral home. They grew up having to defend the family's territory from raids from the Scyre and the Claw clans. Phasma orchestrates the deaths of her family, including her father and mother, in order to ensure both herself and Keldo survive while still being able to live in the Nautilus.[1343]
    • Captain Cardinal begins training a new generation of First Order stormtroopers on the Absolution under Brendol Hux.[1343]
    • Exantor Divo, son of the once agent of Imperial Security Bureau Andressa Divo, and grandson of the once police inspector of the Coruscant Security Force Tanivos Exantor Divo, graduates from the Hosnian Prime Academy of Law Enforcement.[40]
    • Yama Dex is born on Corellia.[1418]
  • 20 ABY
    • Mattis Banz is born on the planet Durkteel.[1419]
    • Dec Hansen is born on the planet Ques.[1419]
    • Jinby is born.[1419]
  • 21 ABY
    • Sith loyalist Ochi of Bestoon kills Rey's father and mother after the pair sold[50] Rey to Unkar Plutt on Jakku[21] in hopes of isolating the youngling from the reach of the Sith.[50]
    • Luke Skywalker and Lando Calrissian undertakes a mission to Pasaana,[1420] in which the duo tracks Ochi of Bestoon after Skywalker sensed a disturbance in the Force. The two fail to find Ochi, who eventually dies on Pasaana. Calrissian stays on the planet after finding peace and a sense of community amongst the local Aki-Aki.[50]
    • The First Order is formed.[21]
    • The First Order begins using Rinnrivin Di's cartel and the Amaxine warriors to procure funds for constructing its navy.[643][21]
    • Lula Sooger is born.[1421]
    • Shari is born.[1422]
  • 22 ABY
    • Egil dies on Parnassos.[1423]
  • 23 ABY
    • Poe Dameron leaves the Spice Runners of Kijimi and returns home.[1424]
    • Captain CD-0922, the bodyguard of Brendol Hux, lead stormtrooper trainer of the Finalizer, and formerly the Jakku orphan Archex, is presented a personalized set of red stormtrooper armor and given the name Cardinal by Hux, his father figure.[1343]
  • 24 ABY
    • Aboard the Naboo yacht of the late Emperor Palpatine, Brendol Hux and a small group of stormtroopers crash on Parnassos. They leave Parnassos after recruiting the Scyre warrior Phasma, who betrays her people to seek a better life, and the girl Frey, who is placed in the stormtrooper training program.[1343]
    • Cardinal is tasked with introducing Phasma to First Order technology and protocols, and Cardinal's duty as the lead stormtrooper trainer is split with Phasma. Cardinal is transferred to the Absolution, and Brendol Hux acquires a new bodyguard.[1343]
    • Joph Seastriker enrolls in the New Republic Academy.[643]
  • 25 ABY
    • Phasma forges her own stormtrooper armor from chromium that was salvaged from the Emperor's favorite yacht, sparking greater jealousy from Cardinal.[1343]
    • Greer Sonnel is diagnosed with Bloodburn syndrome.[643][1425]
    • Ten year old Rey crafted a toy doll of a Rebel pilot using debris she found in the junkfields of Jakku.[55]
  • 26 ABY
    • Rose and Paige Tico crash a Z-95 Headhunter in a flight simulation.[1426] (Approximate date)[1427]
  • 27 ABY
    • The New Republic issues a wanted poster for crime lord Rinnrivin Di.[1428]
    • Temmin Wexley joins the New Republic Defense Fleet.[1429]
    • Poe Dameron joins the New Republic Academy.[1430]
  • 28 ABY[1431]
    • A dedication ceremony is held on Hosnian Prime in honor of Bail Organa; a seventy-meter-high Jelucani fogstone statue of him, designed by Janyor of Bith, is revealed. Senator Tai-Lin Garr and Leia Organa address a vast crowd of a thousand different species, reminding them of the sacrifices the galaxy made to restore the Republic.[643]
    • A period of political turmoil is lived in the New Republic Senate caused by the Amaxine warriors, a paramilitary faction secretly supported by the First Order, which had began chanelling funds via the Rinnrivin Di's cartel through to the Amaxine warriors in order to restore the legacy of the former Empire.[643]
      • Over a seven year period, Rinnrivin Di had created a criminal empire based on smuggling and gambling. Eventually, Rinnrivin's activities exacted a economic toll on the Gaulus sector, which included Ryloth. In response, the Ryloth government dispatched Emissary Yendor Brethen to petition the New Republic Senate on Hosnian Prime for help. The Populist Senator Leia Organa and her Centrist colleague Ransolm Casterfo agree to investigate on behalf of the Senate. They travel to the planet Bastatha, hosted by Magistrates Xun and Tosta, who take them on a tour of their casino, and there Leia is kidnapped by Rinnrivin's henchmen who bring her to Rinnrivin's underground headquarters. He tries to bribe the senator into easing restrictions on the spice trade. However, Casterfo manages to track down Leia and rescue her. The two escape and alert the Bastatha security forces. After searching Rinnrivin's headquarters, they discover evidence that Rinnrivin was funneling his profits into shadow corporations in the Outer Rim.[643]
      • The Amaxine warriors bomb a conference building of the New Republic Senate on Hosnian Prime, acting on the orders of Lady Carise Sindian, a senator who wants to create a distraction while the First Order prepares to emerge from hiding in the Unknown Regions. As the bombing is only intended to be a distraction and not an all-out act of war, a warning is left on a paper streamer hidden by a napkin inside the conference building, which allows Leia Organa to have the premises evacuated. Although the bombing manages to spawn confusion in the Senate, further pitting the Centrist and Populist against each other, Sindian chastises the Amaxines, criticizing them for not having created a more discreet distraction.[643]
      • Leia Organa and her senatorial staff travel to the planet Sibensko, and posing as smugglers, they manage to infiltrate the underwater Sibensko city. While Greer Sonnel and Joph Seastriker load thermal detonators, Leia manages to download banking records linking the Amaxine warriors to Rinnrivin Di's cartel. Leia is cornered by Rinnrivin Di but manages to kill him and his henchmen by collapsing a hydraulic tunnel on them. She flees up a landing platform where is rescued by Han Solo. They shoot a Amaxine starfighter that crashes into the ammunition depot, destroying the underwater city and the Amaxine base, effectively eliminating Rinnrivin Di's cartel and the Amaxine warriors as reliable First Order proxy agents.[643]
      • On Hosnian Prime, New Republic Senator Tai-Lin Garr is assassinated by Arliz Hadrassian, leader of the Amaxine warriors. Garr was a prominent member of the Populist faction in the New Republic Senate who had been nominated as the new Populist candidate for First Senator. After shooting Garr, Hadrassian turns the gun on herself.[643]
    • Following the assassination, the Populists hold a memory service to honor their fallen comrade. Later Lady Carise Sindian fabricates evidence framing Ransolm Casterfo as an accomplice of Hadrassian, and he is arrested.[643]
    • Senator Leia Organa resigns from the Galactic Senate following revelations of her parentage. Organa then begins forming the Resistance paramilitary group.[643][1432]
    • Carise Sindian is expelled from Elder Houses.[643]
    • Brendol Hux contacts Snoke through the latter's sentry droid.[196]
    • Luke Skywalker's Jedi Temple is destroyed[1433] and the new generation of Jedi are killed by Ben Solo,[59] who is surrounded by darkness.[50] Solo flees the site, but he is pursued by students Hennix, Tai, and Voe.[1434] Fueled by the words of Snoke and Darth Sidious at the Drengir's Amaxine station and the Sith Citadel on Exegol, respectively, Solo is torn apart by expectations as the heir to galactic heroes and thinks that he had no choice. Assuming the name Kylo Ren, he turns to the dark side of the Force and takes the place of Ren as master of the Knights of Ren, in the process killing[1435] Hennix in a Battle of Elphrona[1436] and Voe in a skirmish on the Minemoon of Mimban.[1435] Kylo Ren later becomes a First Order warlord.[55]
    • Luke Skywalker goes into exile over Kylo Ren's fall to the dark side; he ultimately retreats to the ancient world of Ahch-To by a route inscribed upon a holographic map with his personal X-wing.[1437]
    • Han Solo and Leia Organa drift apart following their son's fall.[50]
    • Allegiant General Enric Pryde is issued the Steadfast Resurgent-class Star Destroyer by Supreme Leader Snoke.[50]

Cold War (29–34 ABY)[]

  • 29 ABY
    • World secede from the New Republic, publicly forming the political formation of the First Order. The Cold War begins.[1438]
    • The Resistance is staffed to operational levels.[1438]
    • Leia Organa begins to search for Luke Skywalker.[1438]
    • R2-D2 goes into low-power mode.[1438]
    • BB-8 is built[1438] on Hosnian Prime.[50]
  • 30 ABY
    • BB-8 is assigned to Poe Dameron.[1439]
    • Brendol Hux is killed[1440] under suspicious circumstances, and his son, Armitage, takes over as head of the First Order infantry.[1343]
  • 31 ABY
    • Two pirate crews, led by Sidon Ithano and Scorza respectively, compete in a treasure hunt for the lost Treasure of Count Dooku on board the crashed Separatist warship Obrexta III on the planet Ponemah Terminal. Scorza is killed by reactivated B2 super battle droids, and the treasure turns out to be the clone trooper Kix, who had been captured and put in Cryo-cycle stasis by the Confederacy of Independent Systems after he had discovered Order 66 before it happened. Kix joins Sidon Ithano's crew.[1441]
    • Poe Dameron and BB-8 leaves the New Republic for the Resistance.[1442]
    • Gannis Ducain steals Millennium Falcon from Han Solo.[1443]
  • 32 ABY
    • Poe Dameron forms Black Squadron and begins searching for Lor San Tekka; the Hunt for Lor San Tekka commences.[1444]
  • 33 ABY
